"},{"id":3,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":4,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"seen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"The following code sections were retrieved:
Path: config_template.yaml
 1	# HKEX 公告下载器配置文件模板
 2	# 复制此文件为 config.yaml 并修改相应设置
 3	
 4	# 基本设置
 5	settings:
 6	 # 下载文件保存的根目录路径
 7	 save_path: "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop"
 8	 
 9	 # 下载文件名的最大长度（字符数）
 10	 filename_length: 220
 11	 
 12	 # 语言设置：zh（中文）或 en（英文）
 13	 language: "zh"
 14	 
 15	 # 每次搜索返回的最大结果数
 16	 max_results: 500
 17	 
 18	 # 是否启用详细日志输出
 19	 verbose_logging: true
 20	 
 21	 # 日志文件路径（可选，不设置则只输出到控制台）
 22	 log_file: "hkex_downloader.log"
 23	
 24	# 默认日期范围设置
 25	date_range:
 26	 # 默认开始日期（格式：YYYY-MM-DD，或使用相对日期）
 27	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 28	 
 29	 # 默认结束日期（格式：YYYY-MM-DD，today表示今天）
 30	 end_date: "today"
 31	 
 32	 # 相对日期设置（与 start_date/end_date 二选一）
 33	 # 如：下载最近30天的公告
 34	 # relative_days: 30
 35	
 36	# 下载任务配置（支持批量下载多个股票）
 37	download_tasks:
 38	 # 任务1：下载指定股票的所有公告
 39	 - name: "中华煤气公告下载"
 40	 stock_code: "00003"
 41	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 42	 end_date: "today"
 43	 keywords: [] # 空数组表示下载所有公告
 44	 enabled: true
 45	 
 46	 # 任务2：下载指定关键字的公告
 47	 - name: "中华煤气财务报告"
 48	 stock_code: "00003"
 49	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 50	 end_date: "today"
 51	 keywords: ["財務報告", "年報", "中期報告"]
 52	 enabled: false
 53	 
 54	 # 任务3：批量下载多个股票
 55	 - name: "蓝筹股公告"
 56	 stock_codes: ["00001", "00002", "00003", "00005"] # 支持多个股票代码
 57	 start_date: "2024-06-01"
 58	 end_date: "today"
 59	 keywords: ["業績", "分派"]
 60	 enabled: false
 61	 
 62	 # 任务4：从数据库读取股票列表
 63	 - name: "数据库股票公告"
 64	 from_database: true
 65	 query: "SELECT stockCode FROM issue WHERE status = 'normal'" # 自定义SQL查询
 66	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 67	 end_date: "today"
 68	 keywords: []
 69	 enabled: false
 70	
 71	# 常用搜索关键字预设
 72	common_keywords:
 73	 financial_reports: ["財務報告", "年報", "中期報告", "季報"]
 74	 announcements: ["業績", "分派", "股息", "配股"]
 75	 corporate_actions: ["合併", "收購", "重組", "分拆"]
 76	 regulatory: ["須予披露", "關連交易", "內幕消息"]
 77	
 78	# 公告分类配置（基于港交所官方分类）
 79	# 启用后，公告将按类型自动分类保存到不同文件夹
 80	announcement_categories:
 81	 enabled: true # 是否启用公告分类功能
 82	 
 83	 # 01_业绩报告 - 财务相关公告
 84	 "01_业绩报告":
 85	 "年报":
 86	 keywords: ["年報", "年报", "Annual Report", "全年業績", "全年业绩"]
 87	 priority: 1
 88	 "中期报告":
 89	 keywords: ["中期報告", "中期报告", "Interim Report", "半年", "中期業績"]
 90	 priority: 1
 91	 "季报":
 92	 keywords: ["季報", "季报", "Quarterly", "第一季", "第二季", "第三季", "第四季"]
 93	 priority: 1
 94	 "业绩公告":
 95	 keywords: ["業績公告", "业绩公告", "業績", "业绩", "盈利警告", "Profit Warning"]
 96	 priority: 2
 97	 
 98	 # 02_交易公告 - 重大交易相关
 99	 "02_交易公告":
 100	 "须予披露交易":
 101	 keywords: ["須予披露交易", "须予披露交易", "Notifiable Transaction", "主要交易"]
 102	 priority: 1
 103	 "关连交易":
 104	 keywords: ["關連交易", "关连交易", "Connected Transaction", "持續關連交易"]
 105	 priority: 1
 106	 "收购合并":
 107	 keywords: ["收購", "收购", "合併", "合并", "Acquisition", "Merger", "出售"]
 108	 priority: 1
 109	 
 110	 # 03_公司管治 - 公司治理相关
 111	 "03_公司管治":
 112	 "股东大会":
 113	 keywords: ["股東大會", "股东大会", "股東週年大會", "AGM", "投票結果", "EGM"]
 114	 priority: 1
 115	 "董事会决议":
 116	 keywords: ["董事", "Director", "董事名單", "董事變更", "委任", "辭任", "董事會"]
 117	 priority: 1
 118	 "权益披露":
 119	 keywords: ["權益披露", "权益披露", "Disclosure of Interest", "權益變動"]
 120	 priority: 1
 121	 
 122	 # 04_业务发展 - 业务运营相关
 123	 "04_业务发展":
 124	 "业务公告":
 125	 keywords: ["業務發展", "业务发展", "Business Development", "營運數據", "运营数据"]
 126	 priority: 2
 127	 "通告公告":
 128	 keywords: ["通告", "公告", "Announcement", "澄清", "回應", "回应"]
 129	 priority: 3
 130	 
 131	 # 05_监管报告 - 监管要求的报告
 132	 "05_监管报告":
 133	 "月报表":
 134	 keywords: ["月報表", "月报表", "Monthly Return", "證券變動", "证券变动"]
 135	 priority: 1
 136	 "上市文件":
 137	 keywords: ["上市文件", "Listing Document", "招股書", "招股书"]
 138	 priority: 1
...
 163	
 164	# 数据库配置（可选）
 165	database:
 166	 # 是否启用数据库功能
 167	 enabled: false
 168	 
 169	 # 数据库连接参数
 170	 host: "localhost"
 171	 port: 3306
 172	 user: "root"
 173	 password: ""
 174	 database: "ccass"
 175	 
 176	 # 默认股票表配置（适配issue表结构）
 177	 default_table: "issue"
 178	 
 179	 # 字段映射（根据issue表结构调整）
 180	 fields:
 181	 stock_code: "stockCode" # 股票代码字段名（varchar(8)）
 182	 stock_name: "stockName" # 股票名称字段名（varchar(255)）
 183	 status: "status" # 股票状态字段名（enum: normal/parallel/parallel_end）
 184	 issue_id: "issueID" # 问题ID字段名（bigint，关联stocklistings表）
 185	 status_filter: ["normal"] # 状态过滤器（可选：normal/parallel/parallel_end）
 186	 
 187	 # 连接设置
 188	 connection:
 189	 charset: "utf8mb4"
 190	 autocommit: true
 191	 connect_timeout: 30
 192	 read_timeout: 30
 193	 max_retries: 3
 194	
 195	# 高级设置
 196	advanced:
 197	 # 下载重试次数
 198	 retry_attempts: 3
 199	 
 200	 # 请求间隔时间（秒）
 201	 request_delay: 1
 202	 
 203	 # 超时设置（秒）
 204	 timeout: 30
 205	 
 206	 # 是否覆盖已存在的文件
 207	 overwrite_existing: false
 208	 
 209	 # 用户代理字符串（一般不需要修改）
 210	 user_agent: "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/101.0.4951.67 Safari/537.36" ...

\u914d\u7f6e\n\n\u7f16\u8f91 `config.yaml` \u6587\u4ef6\uff1a\n\n```yaml\n# \u57fa\u672c\u8bbe\u7f6e\nsettings:\n save_path: \"C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop\" # \u4e0b\u8f7d\u4fdd\u5b58\u8def\u5f84\n filename_length: 220 # \u6587\u4ef6\u540d\u6700\u5927\u957f\u5ea6\n language: \"zh\" # \u8bed\u8a00\u8bbe\u7f6e (zh/en)\n max_results: 500 # \u6bcf\u6b21\u641c\u7d22\u6700\u5927\u7ed3\u679c\u6570\n \u7a7a\u6570\u7ec4\u8868\u793a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u6240\u6709\u516c\u544a\n enabled: true\n```\n\n## \ud83c\udfaf \u4f7f\u7528\u65b9\u6cd5\n\n### \u547d\u4ee4\u884c\u4f7f\u7528\n\n#### \u57fa\u672c\u7528\u6cd5\n```bash\n# \u4f7f\u7528\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u7684\u4efb\u52a1\npython main.py\n\n# \u4e0b\u8f7d\u5355\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\u7684\u6240\u6709\u516c\u544a\npython  224	class AnnouncementClassifier:
 225	 """公告分类识别器"""
 226	
 227	 def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
 228	 self.config = config
 229	 self.categories = config.get('announcement_categories', {})
 230	 self.enabled = self.categories.get('enabled', True)
 231	
 232	 # 初始化繁简体转换器
 233	 try:
 234	 import opencc
 235	 self.t2s_converter = opencc.OpenCC('t2s') # 繁体转简体
 236	 self.s2t_converter = opencc.OpenCC('s2t') # 简体转繁体
 237	 self.opencc_available = True
 238	 except ImportError:
 239	 print("警告：OpenCC库未安装，繁简体转换功能将被禁用")
 240	 self.opencc_available = False
 241	 self.t2s_converter = None
 242	 self.s2t_converter = None
 243	
 244	 def _convert_text(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 245	 """
 246	 将文本转换为繁简体版本
 247	
 248	 Args:
 249	 text: 原始文本
 250	
 251	 Returns:
 252	 List[str]: 包含原文、繁体、简体的文本列表
 253	 """
 254	 variants = [text]
 255	
 256	 if self.opencc_available and self.s2t_converter and self.t2s_converter:
 257	 try:
 258	 # 添加繁体版本
 259	 traditional = self.s2t_converter.convert(text)
 260	 if traditional != text:
 261	 variants.append(traditional)
 262	
 263	 # 添加简体版本
 264	 simplified = self.t2s_converter.convert(text)
 265	 if simplified != text:
 266	 variants.append(simplified)
 267	 except Exception as e:
 268	 print(f"繁简体转换失败: {e}")
 269	
 270	 return variants

 281	 """

 283	 return "99_其他", "其他"

 412	 def __init__(self, config_file: str = "config.yaml"):
 413	 self.config_file = config_file

 417	 """加载配置文件"""
 418	 if not os.path.exists(self.config_file):
 419	 self.create_default_config()
 420	
 421	 try:
 422	 with open(self.config_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 423	 config = yaml.safe_load(f)
 424	
 425	 # 验证配置文件结构
 426	 self.validate_config(config)
 427	 return config

 429	 except Exception as e:

 488	 def get(self, section: str, key: str = None, default=None):
 489	 """获取配置值"""
 490	 if key is None:
 491	 return self.config.get(section, default)
 492	 return self.config.get(section, {}).get(key, default)

 494	 def parse_date(self, date_str: str) -> datetime:
 495	 """解析日期字符串"""
 496	 if date_str.lower() == 'today':
 497	 return datetime.now()
 498	 elif date_str.lower() == 'yesterday':
 499	 return datetime.now() - timedelta(days=1)
 500	 else:
 501	 try:
 502	 return datetime.strptime(date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
 503	 except ValueError:
 504	 raise ValueError(f"无效的日期格式: {date_str}，请使用 YYYY-MM-DD 格式")
 505	
 506	 def get_database_manager(self) -> Optional[DatabaseManager]:
 507	 """获取数据库管理器实例"""
 508	 if not self.config.get('database', {}).get('enabled', False):
 509	 return None
 510	 return DatabaseManager(self.config)

 539	 self.config = config_manager
 540	 self.headers = {
 541	 "User-Agent": self.config.get('advanced', 'user_agent')
 542	 }
 543	 self.session = requests.Session()
 544	 self.session.headers.update(self.headers)
 545	
 546	 # 设置超时和重试
 547	 self.timeout = self.config.get('advanced', 'timeout', 30)
 548	 self.retry_attempts = self.config.get('advanced', 'retry_attempts', 3)
 549	 self.request_delay = self.config.get('advanced', 'request_delay', 1)
 550	
 551	 # 初始化公告分类器
 552	 self.classifier = AnnouncementClassifier(self.config.config)

","workspace_file_chunks":[]},{"status":"success","request_id":"0d3df0b8-6e66-4805-9ca9-93c7bd53b452","request_message":"","structured_output_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":5,"content":"","tool_use":{"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01QYm5Cgo1wJsxsodXZ3hf5f","tool_name":"str-replace-editor","input_json":"{"instruction_reminder": "ALWAYS BREAK DOWN EDITS INTO SMALLER CHUNKS OF AT MOST 150 LINES EACH.", "command": "str_replace", "path": "README.md", "old_str": "## \ud83d\udcdc \u8bb8\u53ef\u8bc1\n\nMIT License\n\n## \ud83d\udc68\u200d\ud83d\udcbb \u4f5c\u8005\n\nVictor Suen\n\n---\n\n**\u6ce8\u610f**: \u8bf7\u9075\u5b88\u6e2f\u4ea4\u6240\u7f51\u7ad9\u7684\u4f7f\u7528\u6761\u6b3e\uff0c\u5408\u7406\u4f7f\u7528\u672c\u5de5\u5177\u3002", "old_str_start_line_number": 264, "old_str_end_line_number": 272, "new_str": "## \ud83d\udcda API\u53c2\u8003\n\n### \u547d\u4ee4\u884c\u53c2\u6570\n\n| \u53c2\u6570 | \u7b80\u5199 | \u8bf4\u660e | \u793a\u4f8b |\n|------|------|------|------|\n| `--config` | `-c` | \u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84 | `-c my_config.yaml` |\n| `--stock-code` | `-s` | \u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801(5\u4f4d) | `-s 00001` |\n| `--keywords` | `-k` | \u641c\u7d22\u5173\u952e\u5b57 | `-k \"\u5e74\u62a5\" \"\u8d22\u52a1\"` |\n| `--start` | | \u5f00\u59cb\u65e5\u671f | `--start 2024-01-01` |\n| `--end` | | \u7ed3\u675f\u65e5\u671f | `--end today` |\n| `--save-path` | | \u4fdd\u5b58\u8def\u5f84 | `--save-path /path/to/save` |\n| `--check-config` | | \u68c0\u67e5\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6 | `--check-config` |\n| `--list-tasks` | | \u5217\u51fa\u6240\u6709\u4efb\u52a1 | `--list-tasks` |\n| `--run-task` | | \u8fd0\u884c\u6307\u5b9a\u4efb\u52a1 | `--run-task \"\u4efb\u52a1\u540d\"` |\n| `--test-db` | | \u6d4b\u8bd5\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u8fde\u63a5 | `--test-db` |\n| `--db-stocks` | | \u4ece\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u4e0b\u8f7d | `--db-stocks` |\n| `--verbose` | `-v` | \u8be6\u7ec6\u8f93\u51fa | `-v` |\n\n### \u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u7ed3\u6784\n\n```yaml\nsettings: # \u57fa\u672c\u8bbe\u7f6e\n save_path: string # \u4fdd\u5b58\u8def\u5f84\n filename_length: int # \u6587\u4ef6\u540d\u957f\u5ea6\u9650\u5236\n language: string # \u8bed\u8a00 (zh/en)\n max_results: int # \u6700\u5927\u7ed3\u679c\u6570\n verbose_logging: bool # \u8be6\u7ec6\u65e5\u5fd7\n log_file: string # \u65e5\u5fd7\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84\n\ndate_range: # \u9ed8\u8ba4\u65e5\u671f\u8303\u56f4\n start_date: string # \u5f00\u59cb\u65e5\u671f\n end_date: string # \u7ed3\u675f\u65e5\u671f\n\ndownload_tasks: # \u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\u5217\u8868\n - name: string # \u4efb\u52a1\u540d\u79f0\n stock_code: string # \u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801\n stock_codes: list # \u591a\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801\n start_date: string # \u5f00\u59cb\u65e5\u671f\n end_date: string # \u7ed3\u675f\u65e5\u671f\n keywords: list # \u5173\u952e\u5b57\u5217\u8868\n enabled: bool # \u662f\u5426\u542f\u7528\n from_database: bool # \u4ece\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u8bfb\u53d6\n\ndatabase: # \u6570\u636e\u5e93\u914d\u7f6e\n enabled: bool # \u662f\u5426\u542f\u7528\n host: string # \u4e3b\u673a\u5730\u5740\n port: int # \u7aef\u53e3\u53f7\n user: string # \u7528\u6237\u540d\n password: string # \u5bc6\u7801\n database: string # \u6570\u636e\u5e93\u540d\n\nadvanced: # \u9ad8\u7ea7\u8bbe\u7f6e\n retry_attempts: int # \u91cd\u8bd5\u6b21\u6570\n request_delay: float # \u8bf7\u6c42\u95f4\u9694\n timeout: int # \u8d85\u65f6\u65f6\u95f4\n overwrite_existing: bool # \u8986\u76d6\u5df2\u5b58\u5728\u6587\u4ef6\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udca1 \u4f7f\u7528\u6280\u5de7\n\n### 1. \u6279\u91cf\u4e0b\u8f7d\u591a\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\n```yaml\ndownload_tasks:\n - name: \"\u6e2f\u80a1\u901a\u6807\u7684\"\n stock_codes: [\"00700\", \"00941\", \"01299\", \"02318\"]\n start_date: \"2024-01-01\"\n end_date: \"today\"\n keywords: []\n enabled: true\n```\n\n### 2. \u6309\u7c7b\u578b\u7b5b\u9009\u516c\u544a\n```yaml\n# \u53ea\u4e0b\u8f7d\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\n- name: \"\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\"\n stock_code: \"00700\"\n keywords: [\"\u5e74\u62a5\", \"\u4e2d\u671f\u62a5\u544a\", \"\u5b63\u62a5\", \"\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\"]\n \n# \u53ea\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4ea4\u6613\u516c\u544a\n- name: \"\u4ea4\u6613\u516c\u544a\"\n stock_code: \"00700\"\n keywords: [\"\u6536\u8d2d\", \"\u5408\u5e76\", \"\u987b\u4e88\u62ab\u9732\", \"\u5173\u8fde\u4ea4\u6613\"]\n```\n\n### 3. \u5b9a\u671f\u4efb\u52a1\u8bbe\u7f6e\n```bash\n# \u4f7f\u7528cron\u5b9a\u671f\u6267\u884c (Linux/macOS)\n0 9 * * 1-5 cd /path/to/hkexann && python main.py\n\n# \u4f7f\u7528\u4efb\u52a1\u8ba1\u5212\u7a0b\u5e8f (Windows)\n# \u521b\u5efa\u6279\u5904\u7406\u6587\u4ef6 run_hkex.bat:\ncd /d D:\\py_pro\\hkexann\npython main.py\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udd0d \u9ad8\u7ea7\u529f\u80fd\n\n### \u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u5206\u7c7b\u89c4\u5219\n\n\u53ef\u4ee5\u5728\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u516c\u544a\u5206\u7c7b\u89c4\u5219\uff1a\n\n```yaml\nannouncement_categories:\n enabled: true\n \"\u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u5206\u7c7b\":\n \"\u5b50\u5206\u7c7b\u540d\":\n keywords: [\"\u5173\u952e\u5b571\", \"\u5173\u952e\u5b572\"]\n priority: 1 # \u4f18\u5148\u7ea7\uff0c\u6570\u5b57\u8d8a\u5c0f\u4f18\u5148\u7ea7\u8d8a\u9ad8\n```\n\n### \u6570\u636e\u5e93\u67e5\u8be2\u793a\u4f8b\n\n```yaml\n# \u67e5\u8be2\u7279\u5b9a\u884c\u4e1a\u80a1\u7968\n- name: \"\u94f6\u884c\u80a1\"\n from_database: true\n query: \"SELECT stockCode FROM issue WHERE stockName LIKE '%\u94f6\u884c%' AND status = 'normal'\"\n \n# \u67e5\u8be2\u5e02\u503c\u524d100\u7684\u80a1\u7968\n- name: \"\u5927\u76d8\u80a1\"\n from_database: true\n query: \"SELECT stockCode FROM issue ORDER BY marketCap DESC LIMIT 100\"\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udcca \u6027\u80fd\u4f18\u5316\n\n### 1. \u7f51\u7edc\u4f18\u5316\n```yaml\nadvanced:\n request_delay: 0.5 # \u51cf\u5c11\u8bf7\u6c42\u95f4\u9694 (\u6ce8\u610f\u4e0d\u8981\u8fc7\u4e8e\u9891\u7e41)\n timeout: 60 # \u589e\u52a0\u8d85\u65f6\u65f6\u95f4\n retry_attempts: 5 # \u589e\u52a0\u91cd\u8bd5\u6b21\u6570\n```\n\n### 2. \u6587\u4ef6\u7ba1\u7406\n```yaml\nsettings:\n filename_length: 200 # \u9002\u5f53\u7684\u6587\u4ef6\u540d\u957f\u5ea6\n \nadvanced:\n overwrite_existing: false # \u907f\u514d\u91cd\u590d\u4e0b\u8f7d\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udcdc \u8bb8\u53ef\u8bc1\n\nMIT License\n\n## \ud83d\udc68\u200d\ud83d\udcbb \u4f5c\u8005\n\nVictor Suen\n\n## \ud83d\ude4f \u81f4\u8c22\n\n- \u6e2f\u4ea4\u6240\u63d0\u4f9b\u7684\u516c\u5f00\u6570\u636e\u63a5\u53e3\n- Python\u5f00\u6e90\u793e\u533a\u7684\u4f18\u79c0\u5e93\n\n---\n\n**\u514d\u8d23\u58f0\u660e**: \u672c\u5de5\u5177\u4ec5\u4f9b\u5b66\u4e60\u548c\u7814\u7a76\u4f7f\u7528\uff0c\u8bf7\u9075\u5b88\u6e2f\u4ea4\u6240\u7f51\u7ad9\u7684\u4f7f\u7528\u6761\u6b3e\u548c\u76f8\u5173\u6cd5\u5f8b\u6cd5\u89c4\u3002\u4f7f\u7528\u8005\u9700\u5bf9\u4f7f\u7528\u672c\u5de5\u5177\u4ea7\u751f\u7684\u4efb\u4f55\u540e\u679c\u627f\u62c5\u8d23\u4efb\u3002"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":2,"type":0,"content":"现在让我为README添加更多详细信息，包括API参考和更多示例：

\u57fa\u672c\u8bbe\u7f6e\n save_path: string # \u4fdd\u5b58\u8def\u5f84\n filename_length: int # \u6587\u4ef6\u540d\u957f\u5ea6\u9650\u5236\n language: string # \u8bed\u8a00 (zh/en)\n max_results: int # \u5f00\u59cb\u65e5\u671f\n end_date: string # \u7ed3\u675f\u65e5\u671f\n\ndownload_tasks: # \u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\u5217\u8868\n - name: string # \u4efb\u52a1\u540d\u79f0\n stock_code: string # \u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801\n stock_codes: list # \u591a\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801\n start_date: string # \u5f00\u59cb\u65e5\u671f\n end_date: string # \u7ed3\u675f\u65e5\u671f\n keywords: list # \u5173\u952e\u5b57\u5217\u8868\n enabled: bool # \u662f\u5426\u542f\u7528\n from_database: bool # \u4ece\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u8bfb\u53d6\n\ndatabase: # \u6570\u636e\u5e93\u914d\u7f6e\n enabled: bool # \u662f\u5426\u542f\u7528\n host: string # \u4e3b\u673a\u5730\u5740\n port: int # \u7aef\u53e3\u53f7\n user: string # \u7528\u6237\u540d\n password: string # \u5bc6\u7801\n database: string # \u6570\u636e\u5e93\u540d\n\nadvanced: # \u9ad8\u7ea7\u8bbe\u7f6e\n retry_attempts: int # \u91cd\u8bd5\u6b21\u6570\n request_delay: float # \u8bf7\u6c42\u95f4\u9694\n timeout: int # \u8d85\u65f6\u65f6\u95f4\n overwrite_existing: bool # \u8986\u76d6\u5df2\u5b58\u5728\u6587\u4ef6\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udca1 \u4f7f\u7528\u6280\u5de7\n\n### 1. \u6279\u91cf\u4e0b\u8f7d\u591a\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\n```yaml\ndownload_tasks:\n - name: \"\u6e2f\u80a1\u901a\u6807\u7684\"\n stock_codes: [\"00700\", \"00941\", \"01299\", \"02318\"]\n start_date: \"2024-01-01\"\n end_date: \"today\"\n keywords: []\n enabled: true\n```\n\n### 2. \u6309\u7c7b\u578b\u7b5b\u9009\u516c\u544a\n```yaml\n# \u53ea\u4e0b\u8f7d\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\n- name: \"\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\"\n stock_code: \"00700\"\n keywords: [\"\u5e74\u62a5\", \"\u4e2d\u671f\u62a5\u544a\", \"\u5b63\u62a5\", \"\u8d22\u52a1\u62a5\u544a\"]\n \n# \u53ea\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4ea4\u6613\u516c\u544a\n- name: \"\u4ea4\u6613\u516c\u544a\"\n stock_code: \"00700\"\n keywords: [\"\u6536\u8d2d\", \"\u5408\u5e76\", \"\u987b\u4e88\u62ab\u9732\", \"\u5173\u8fde\u4ea4\u6613\"]\n```\n\n### 3. \u5b9a\u671f\u4efb\u52a1\u8bbe\u7f6e\n```bash\n# \u4f7f\u7528cron\u5b9a\u671f\u6267\u884c (Linux/macOS)\n0 9 * * 1-5 cd /path/to/hkexann && python main.py\n\n# \u4f7f\u7528\u4efb\u52a1\u8ba1\u5212\u7a0b\u5e8f (Windows)\n# \u521b\u5efa\u6279\u5904\u7406\u6587\u4ef6 run_hkex.bat:\ncd /d D:\\py_pro\\hkexann\npython main.py\n```\n\n## \ud83d\udd0d \u9ad8\u7ea7\u529f\u80fd\n\n### \u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u5206\u7c7b\u89c4\u5219\n\n\u53ef\u4ee5\u5728\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u516c\u544a\u5206\u7c7b\u89c4\u5219\uff1a\n\n```yaml\nannouncement_categories:\n enabled: true\n \"\u81ea\u5b9a\u4e49\u5206\u7c7b\":\n \"\u5b50\u5206\u7c7b\u540d\":\n keywords: [\"\u5173\u952e\u5b571\", \"\u5173\u952e\u5b572\"]\n priority: 1 #  1	# HKEX 公告下载器 (HKEX Announcement Downloader)
 2	
 3	一个功能强大的港交所公告自动下载工具，支持批量下载、智能分类、数据库集成等功能。
 4	
 5	## 功能特性
 6	
 7	- **批量下载**: 支持单个或多个股票的公告批量下载
 8	- **智能分类**: 基于港交所官方分类自动整理公告到不同文件夹
 9	- **数据库集成**: 支持从MySQL数据库读取股票列表
 10	- **关键字搜索**: 支持按关键字筛选特定类型的公告
 11	- **日期范围**: 灵活的日期范围设置，支持相对日期
 12	- **配置驱动**: 通过YAML配置文件管理所有设置
 13	- **命令行界面**: 提供丰富的命令行参数
 14	- **日志记录**: 详细的操作日志和错误追踪
 15	- **繁简转换**: 支持繁简体中文关键字匹配
 16	
 17	## 系统要求
 18	
 19	- Python 3.7+
 20	- Windows/Linux/macOS
 21	- 网络连接
 22	
 23	## ️ 安装
 24	
 25	### 1. 克隆项目
 26	```bash
 27	git clone https://github.com/your-username/hkexann.git
 28	cd hkexann
 29	```
 30	
 31	### 2. 安装依赖
 32	```bash
 33	pip install -r requirements.txt
 34	```
 35	
 36	### 3. 配置文件
 37	复制配置模板并修改：
 38	```bash
 39	cp config_template.yaml config.yaml
 40	```
 41	
 42	## ⚙️ 配置
 43	
 44	编辑 `config.yaml` 文件：
 45	
 46	```yaml
 47	# 基本设置
 48	settings:
 49	 save_path: "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop" # 下载保存路径
 50	 filename_length: 220 # 文件名最大长度
 51	 language: "zh" # 语言设置 (zh/en)
 52	 max_results: 500 # 每次搜索最大结果数
 53	 verbose_logging: true # 详细日志
 54	 log_file: "hkex_downloader.log" # 日志文件
 55	
 56	# 下载任务配置
 57	download_tasks:
 58	 - name: "中华煤气公告下载"
 59	 stock_code: "00003"
 60	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 61	 end_date: "today"
 62	 keywords: [] # 空数组表示下载所有公告
 63	 enabled: true
 64	```
 65	
 66	## 使用方法
 67	
 68	### 命令行使用
 69	
 70	#### 基本用法
 71	```bash
 72	# 使用配置文件中的任务
 73	python main.py
 74	
 75	# 下载单个股票的所有公告
 76	python main.py -s 00001
 77	
 78	# 下载指定关键字的公告
 79	python main.py -s 00001 -k "财务报告" "年报"
 80	
 81	# 指定日期范围
 82	python main.py -s 00001 --start 2024-01-01 --end 2024-12-31
 83	
 84	# 使用自定义配置文件
 85	python main.py --config my_config.yaml
 86	```
 87	
 88	#### 高级功能
 89	```bash
 90	# 检查配置文件
 91	python main.py --check-config
 92	
 93	# 列出所有任务
 94	python main.py --list-tasks
 95	
 96	# 运行指定任务
 97	python main.py --run-task "中华煤气公告下载"
 98	
 99	# 测试数据库连接
 100	python main.py --test-db
 101	
 102	# 从数据库获取股票列表并下载
 103	python main.py --db-stocks
 104	```
 105	
 106	### 配置文件任务
 107	
 108	支持多种任务类型：
 109	
 110	#### 1. 单个股票任务
 111	```yaml
 112	- name: "腾讯控股公告"
 113	 stock_code: "00700"
 114	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 115	 end_date: "today"
 116	 keywords: ["业绩", "财务报告"]
 117	 enabled: true
 118	```
 119	
 120	#### 2. 多个股票任务
 121	```yaml
 122	- name: "蓝筹股公告"
 123	 stock_codes: ["00001", "00002", "00003", "00005"]
 124	 start_date: "2024-06-01"
 125	 end_date: "today"
 126	 keywords: ["业绩", "分派"]
 127	 enabled: true
 128	```
 129	
 130	#### 3. 数据库任务
 131	```yaml
 132	- name: "数据库股票公告"
 133	 from_database: true
 134	 query: "SELECT stockCode FROM issue WHERE status = 'normal'"
 135	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 136	 end_date: "today"
 137	 keywords: []
 138	 enabled: true
 139	```
 140	
 141	## ️ 数据库集成
 142	
 143	支持MySQL数据库集成，可以从数据库读取股票列表：
 144	
 145	```yaml
 146	database:
 147	 enabled: true
 148	 host: "localhost"
 149	 port: 3306
 150	 user: "root"
 151	 password: "your_password"
 152	 database: "ccass"
 153	 default_table: "issue"
 154	 fields:
 155	 stock_code: "stockCode"
 156	 stock_name: "stockName"
 157	 status: "status"
 158	 issue_id: "issueID"
 159	 status_filter: ["normal"]
 160	```
 161	
 162	## 智能分类
 163	
 164	程序会根据公告标题自动分类到不同文件夹：
 165	
 166	```
 167	HKEX/
 168	├── 00001/
 169	│ ├── 01_业绩报告/
 170	│ │ ├── 年报/
 171	│ │ ├── 中期报告/
 172	│ │ └── 季报/
 173	│ ├── 02_交易公告/
 174	│ │ ├── 须予披露交易/
 175	│ │ └── 关连交易/
 176	│ └── 03_公司管治/
 177	│ ├── 股东大会/
 178	│ └── 董事会决议/
 179	```
 180	
 181	## 日志
 182	
 183	程序会生成详细的日志文件 `hkex_downloader.log`：
 184	
 185	```
 186	2025-07-17 09:57:07,832 - INFO - 开始下载任务: 默认下载任务
 187	2025-07-17 09:57:07,832 - INFO - 股票代码: 00081, 日期范围: 2024-01-01 至 2025-07-17
 188	2025-07-17 09:57:08,055 - INFO - 找到 105 个符合条件的公告
 189	```
 190	
 191	## 故障排除
 192	
 193	### 常见问题
 194	
 195	1. **网络连接错误**
 196	 - 检查网络连接
 197	 - 确认港交所网站可访问
 198	
 199	2. **配置文件错误**
 200	 ```bash
 201	 python main.py --check-config
 202	 ```
 203	
 204	3. **数据库连接失败**
 205	 ```bash
 206	 python main.py --test-db
 207	 ```
 208	
 209	4. **文件权限问题**
 210	 - 确保保存路径有写入权限
 211	 - 检查磁盘空间
 212	
 213	## 文件结构
 214	
 215	```
 216	hkexann/
 217	├── main.py # 主程序文件
 218	├── config.yaml # 配置文件
 219	├── config_template.yaml # 配置模板
 220	├── hkex_downloader.log # 日志文件
 221	├── README.md # 说明文档
 222	└── requirements.txt # 依赖列表
 223	```
 224	
 225	## 贡献
 226	
 227	欢迎提交Issue和Pull Request！
 228	
 229	## 许可证
 230	
 231	MIT License
 232	
 233	**注意**: 请遵守港交所网站的使用条款，合理使用本工具。

then\n print_error \"\u672a\u627e\u5230Python3\uff0c\u8bf7\u5148\u5b89\u88c5Python 3.7+\"\n exit 1\n fi\n print_success \"Python\u68c0\u67e5\u901a\u8fc7\"\n}\n\n# \u68c0\u67e5\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\ncheck_config() {\n if [ ! -f \"config.yaml\" ]; then\n print_warning \"\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e0d\u5b58\u5728\uff0c\u6b63\u5728\u521b\u5efa...\"\n if [ -f \"config_template.yaml\" ]; then\n cp config_template.yaml config.yaml\n print_success \"\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u5df2\u521b\u5efa\uff0c\u8bf7\u7f16\u8f91 config.yaml \u540e\u91cd\u65b0\u8fd0\u884c\"\n exit 0\n else\n print_error \"\u914d\u7f6e\u6a21\u677f\u6587\u4ef6\u4e0d\u5b58\u5728\"\n exit 1\n fi\n fi\n}\n\n# \u663e\u793a\u83dc\u5355\nshow_menu() {\n echo\n echo \"========================================\"\n echo \" HKEX \u516c\u544a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u5668 - \u5feb\u901f\u542f\u52a8\"\n echo \"========================================\"\n echo\n echo \"\u8bf7\u9009\u62e9\u64cd\u4f5c:\"\n echo \"1. \u8fd0\u884c\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u7684\u4efb\u52a1\"\n echo \"2. \u4e0b\u8f7d\u5355\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\u516c\u544a\"\n echo \"3. \u68c0\u67e5\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\"\n echo \"4. \u5217\u51fa\u6240\u6709\u4efb\u52a1\"\n echo \"5. \u6d4b\u8bd5\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u8fde\u63a5\"\n echo \"6. \u9000\u51fa\"\n echo\n}\n\n# \u8fd0\u884c\u914d\u7f6e\u4efb\u52a1\nrun_config_tasks() {\n print_info \"\u8fd0\u884c\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u7684\u4efb\u52a1...\"\n python3 main.py\n}\n\n# \u4e0b\u8f7d\u5355\u4e2a\u80a1\u7968\ndownload_single_stock() {\n echo\n read -p \"\u8bf7\u8f93\u5165\u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801 (5\u4f4d\u6570\u5b57): \" stock_code\n if [ -z \"$stock_code\" ]; then\n print_error \"\u80a1\u7968\u4ee3\u7801\u4e0d\u80fd\u4e3a\u7a7a\"\n return\n fi\n print_info \"\u4e0b\u8f7d\u80a1\u7968 $stock_code \u7684\u516c\u544a...\"\n python3 main.py -s \"$stock_code\"\n}\n\n# \u68c0\u67e5\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\ncheck_config_file() {\n print_info \"\u68c0\u67e5\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6...\"\n python3 main.py --check-config\n}\n\n# \u5217\u51fa\u4efb\u52a1\nlist_tasks() {\n print_info \"\u5217\u51fa\u6240\u6709\u4efb\u52a1...\"\n python3 main.py --list-tasks\n}\n\n# \u6d4b\u8bd5\u6570\u636e\u5e93\ntest_database() {\n print_info \"\u6d4b\u8bd5\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u8fde\u63a5...\"\n python3 main.py --test-db\n}\n\n# \u4e3b\u51fd\u6570\nmain() {\n # \u68c0\u67e5\u73af\u5883\n check_python\n check_config\n \n while true;  7	 save_path: "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop"
 8	 
 9	 # 下载文件名的最大长度（字符数）
 10	 filename_length: 220
 11	 
 12	 # 语言设置：zh（中文）或 en（英文）
 13	 language: "zh"
 14	 
 15	 # 每次搜索返回的最大结果数
 16	 max_results: 500
 17	 
 18	 # 是否启用详细日志输出
 19	 verbose_logging: true
 20	 
 21	 # 日志文件路径（可选，不设置则只输出到控制台）
 22	 log_file: "hkex_downloader.log"
 23	
 24	# 默认日期范围设置
 25	date_range:
 26	 # 默认开始日期（格式：YYYY-MM-DD，或使用相对日期）
 27	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 28	 
 29	 # 默认结束日期（格式：YYYY-MM-DD，today表示今天）
 30	 end_date: "today"
 31	 
 32	 # 相对日期设置（与 start_date/end_date 二选一）
 33	 # 如：下载最近30天的公告
 34	 # relative_days: 30
 35	
 36	# 下载任务配置（支持批量下载多个股票）
 37	download_tasks:
 38	 # 任务1：下载指定股票的所有公告
 39	 - name: "中华煤气公告下载"
 40	 stock_code: "00003"
 41	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 42	 end_date: "today"
 43	 keywords: [] # 空数组表示下载所有公告
 44	 enabled: true
 45	 
 46	 # 任务2：下载指定关键字的公告
 47	 - name: "中华煤气财务报告"
 48	 stock_code: "00003"
 49	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 50	 end_date: "today"
 51	 keywords: ["財務報告", "年報", "中期報告"]
 52	 enabled: false
 53	 
 54	 # 任务3：批量下载多个股票
 55	 - name: "蓝筹股公告"
 56	 stock_codes: ["00001", "00002", "00003", "00005"] # 支持多个股票代码
 57	 start_date: "2024-06-01"
 58	 end_date: "today"
 59	 keywords: ["業績", "分派"]
 60	 enabled: false
 61	 
 62	 # 任务4：从数据库读取股票列表
 63	 - name: "数据库股票公告"
 64	 from_database: true
 65	 query: "SELECT stockCode FROM issue WHERE status = 'normal'" # 自定义SQL查询
 66	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 67	 end_date: "today"
 68	 keywords: []
 69	 enabled: false
 70	
 71	# 常用搜索关键字预设
 72	common_keywords:
 73	 financial_reports: ["財務報告", "年報", "中期報告", "季報"]
 74	 announcements: ["業績", "分派", "股息", "配股"]
 75	 corporate_actions: ["合併", "收購", "重組", "分拆"]
 76	 regulatory: ["須予披露", "關連交易", "內幕消息"]
 77	
 78	# 公告分类配置（基于港交所官方分类）
 79	# 启用后，公告将按类型自动分类保存到不同文件夹
 80	announcement_categories:
 81	 enabled: true # 是否启用公告分类功能
 82

 163	
 164	# 数据库配置（可选）
 165	database:
 166	 # 是否启用数据库功能
 167	 enabled: false
 168	 
 169	 # 数据库连接参数
 170	 host: "localhost"
 171	 port: 3306
 172	 user: "root"
 173	 password: ""
 174	 database: "ccass"
 175	 
 176	 # 默认股票表配置（适配issue表结构）
 177	 default_table: "issue"
 178	 
 179	 # 字段映射（根据issue表结构调整）
 180	 fields:
 181	 stock_code: "stockCode" # 股票代码字段名（varchar(8)）
 182	 stock_name: "stockName" # 股票名称字段名（varchar(255)）
 183	 status: "status" # 股票状态字段名（enum: normal/parallel/parallel_end）
 184	 issue_id: "issueID" # 问题ID字段名（bigint，关联stocklistings表）
 185	 status_filter: ["normal"] # 状态过滤器（可选：normal/parallel/parallel_end）
 186	 
 187	 # 连接设置
 188	 connection:
 189	 charset: "utf8mb4"
 190	 autocommit: true
 191	 connect_timeout: 30
 192	 read_timeout: 30
 193	 max_retries: 3
 194	
 195	# 高级设置
 196	advanced:
 197	 # 下载重试次数
 198	 retry_attempts: 3
 199	 
 200	 # 请求间隔时间（秒）
 201	 request_delay: 1
 202	 
 203	 # 超时设置（秒）
 204	 timeout: 30
 205	 
 206	 # 是否覆盖已存在的文件
 207	 overwrite_existing: false
 208	 
 209	 # 用户代理字符串（一般不需要修改）
 210	 user_agent: "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/101.0.4951.67 Safari/537.36" ...

 434	 def get_default_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 435	 """获取默认配置"""
 436	 return {
 437	 'settings': {
 438	 'save_path': os.path.join(os.path.expanduser("~"), "Desktop"),
 439	 'filename_length': 220,
 440	 'language': 'zh',
 441	 'max_results': 500,

 830	 def create_parser(self) -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
 831	 """创建命令行参数解析器"""
 832	 parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 833	 description='HKEX 公告下载器 - 命令行版本',
 834	 formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
 835	 epilog="""
 836	使用示例:
 837	 %(prog)s # 使用配置文件中的任务
 838	 %(prog)s -s 00001 # 下载单个股票的所有公告
 839	 %(prog)s -s 00001 -k "财务报告" # 下载指定关键字的公告
 840	 %(prog)s -s 00001 --start 2024-01-01 # 指定开始日期
 841	 %(prog)s --config my_config.yaml # 使用指定的配置文件
 842	 %(prog)s --check-config # 检查配置文件
 843	 """)
 844	
 845	 parser.add_argument('-c', '--config',
 846	 default='config.yaml',
 847	 help='配置文件路径 (默认: config.yaml)')
 848	
 849	 parser.add_argument('-s', '--stock-code',
 850	 help='股票代码 (5位数字)')
 851	
 852	 parser.add_argument('-k', '--keywords',
 853	 nargs='*',
 854	 help='搜索关键字')
 855	
 856	 parser.add_argument('--start',

 226	
 227	 def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
 228	 self.config = config
 229	 self.categories = config.get('announcement_categories', {})
 230	 self.enabled = self.categories.get('enabled', True)
 231	
 232	 # 初始化繁简体转换器
 233	 try:
 234	 import opencc
 235	 self.t2s_converter = opencc.OpenCC('t2s') # 繁体转简体
 236	 self.s2t_converter = opencc.OpenCC('s2t') # 简体转繁体
 237	 self.opencc_available = True
 238	 except ImportError:
 239	 print("警告：OpenCC库未安装，繁简体转换功能将被禁用")
 240	 self.opencc_available = False
 241	 self.t2s_converter = None
 242	 self.s2t_converter = None
 243	
 244	 def _convert_text(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 245	 """
 246	 将文本转换为繁简体版本
 247	
 248	 Args:
 249	 text: 原始文本
 250	
 251	 Returns:
 252	 List[str]: 包含原文、繁体、简体的文本列表
 253	 """
 254	 variants = [text]
 255	
 256	 if self.opencc_available and self.s2t_converter and self.t2s_converter:
 257	 try:
 258	 # 添加繁体版本
 259	 traditional = self.s2t_converter.convert(text)
 260	 if traditional != text:
 261	 variants.append(traditional)
 262	
 263	 # 添加简体版本
 264	 simplified = self.t2s_converter.convert(text)
 265	 if simplified != text:
 266	 variants.append(simplified)
 267	 except Exception as e:
 268	 print(f"繁简体转换失败: {e}")
 269	
 270	 return variants

 416	 def load_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 417	 """加载配置文件"""
 418	 if not os.path.exists(self.config_file):
 419	 self.create_default_config()
 420	
 421	 try:
 422	 with open(self.config_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 423	 config = yaml.safe_load(f)
 424	
 425	 # 验证配置文件结构
 426	 self.validate_config(config)
 427	 return config
 428	
 429	 except Exception as e:

 432	 return self.get_default_config()

 494	 def parse_date(self, date_str: str) -> datetime:
 495	 """解析日期字符串"""
 496	 if date_str.lower() == 'today':
 497	 return datetime.now()
 498	 elif date_str.lower() == 'yesterday':
 499	 return datetime.now() - timedelta(days=1)
 500	 else:
 501	 try:
 502	 return datetime.strptime(date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
 503	 except ValueError:
 504	 raise ValueError(f"无效的日期格式: {date_str}，请使用 YYYY-MM-DD 格式")
 505	
 506	 def get_database_manager(self) -> Optional[DatabaseManager]:
 507	 """获取数据库管理器实例"""
 508	 if not self.config.get('database', {}).get('enabled', False):
 509	 return None
 510	 return DatabaseManager(self.config)

 963	 def run_config_tasks(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):

 986	 print("⚠ 未找到符合条件的公告\n")

 991

 1	# HKEX 公告下载器 (HKEX Announcement Downloader)
 2	
 3	一个功能强大的港交所公告自动下载工具，支持批量下载、智能分类、数据库集成等功能。
 4	
 5	## 功能特性
 6	
 7	- **批量下载**: 支持单个或多个股票的公告批量下载
 8	- **智能分类**: 基于港交所官方分类自动整理公告到不同文件夹
 9	- **数据库集成**: 支持从MySQL数据库读取股票列表
 10	- **关键字搜索**: 支持按关键字筛选特定类型的公告
 11	- **日期范围**: 灵活的日期范围设置，支持相对日期
 12	- **配置驱动**: 通过YAML配置文件管理所有设置
 13	- **命令行界面**: 提供丰富的命令行参数
 14	- **日志记录**: 详细的操作日志和错误追踪
 15	- **繁简转换**: 支持繁简体中文关键字匹配
 16	
 17	## 系统要求
 18	
 19	- Python 3.7+
 20	- Windows/Linux/macOS
 21	- 网络连接
 22	
 23	## ️ 安装
 24	
 25	### 1. 克隆项目
 26	```bash
 27	git clone https://github.com/your-username/hkexann.git
 28	cd hkexann
 29	```
 30	
 31	### 2. 安装依赖
 32	```bash
 33	pip install -r requirements.txt
 34	```
 35	
 36	### 3. 配置文件
 37	复制配置模板并修改：
 38	```bash
 39	cp config_template.yaml config.yaml
 40	```
 41	
 42	## ⚙️ 配置
 43	
 44	编辑 `config.yaml` 文件：
 45	
 46	```yaml
 47	# 基本设置
 48	settings:
 49	 save_path: "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop" # 下载保存路径
 50	 filename_length: 220 # 文件名最大长度
 51	 language: "zh" # 语言设置 (zh/en)
 52	 max_results: 500 # 每次搜索最大结果数
 53	 verbose_logging: true # 详细日志
 54	 log_file: "hkex_downloader.log" # 日志文件
 55	
 56	# 下载任务配置
 57	download_tasks:
 58	 - name: "中华煤气公告下载"
 59	 stock_code: "00003"
 60	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 61	 end_date: "today"
 62	 keywords: [] # 空数组表示下载所有公告
 63	 enabled: true
 64	```
 65	
 66	## 使用方法
 67	
 68	### 命令行使用
 69	
 70	#### 基本用法
 71	```bash
 72	# 使用配置文件中的任务
 73	python main.py
 74	
 75	# 下载单个股票的所有公告
 76	python main.py -s 00001
 77	
 78	# 下载指定关键字的公告
 79	python main.py -s 00001 -k "财务报告" "年报"
 80	
 81	# 指定日期范围
 82	python main.py -s 00001 --start 2024-01-01 --end 2024-12-31
 83	
 84	# 使用自定义配置文件
 85	python main.py --config my_config.yaml
 86	```
 87	
 88	#### 高级功能
 89	```bash
 90	# 检查配置文件
 91	python main.py --check-config
 92	
 93	# 列出所有任务
 94	python main.py --list-tasks
 95	
 96	# 运行指定任务
 97	python main.py --run-task "中华煤气公告下载"
 98	
 99	# 测试数据库连接
 100	python main.py --test-db
 101	
 102	# 从数据库获取股票列表并下载
 103	python main.py --db-stocks
 104	```
 105	
 106	### 配置文件任务
 107	
 108	支持多种任务类型：
 109	
 110	#### 1. 单个股票任务
 111	```yaml
 112	- name: "腾讯控股公告"
 113	 stock_code: "00700"
 114	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 115	 end_date: "today"
 116	 keywords: ["业绩", "财务报告"]
 117	 enabled: true
 118	```
 119	
 120	#### 2. 多个股票任务
 121	```yaml
 122	- name: "蓝筹股公告"
 123	 stock_codes: ["00001", "00002", "00003", "00005"]
 124	 start_date: "2024-06-01"
 125	 end_date: "today"
 126	 keywords: ["业绩", "分派"]
 127	 enabled: true
 128	```
 129	
 130	#### 3. 数据库任务
 131	```yaml
 132	- name: "数据库股票公告"
 133	 from_database: true
 134	 query: "SELECT stockCode FROM issue WHERE status = 'normal'"
 135	 start_date: "2024-01-01"
 136	 end_date: "today"
 137	 keywords: []
 138	 enabled: true
 139	```
 140	
 141	## ️ 数据库集成
 142	
 143	支持MySQL数据库集成，可以从数据库读取股票列表：
 144	
 145	```yaml
 146	database:
 147	 enabled: true
 148	 host: "localhost"
 149	 port: 3306
 150	 user: "root"
 151	 password: "your_password"
 152	 database: "ccass"
 153	 default_table: "issue"
 154	 fields:
 155	 stock_code: "stockCode"
 156	 stock_name: "stockName"
 157	 status: "status"
 158	 issue_id: "issueID"
 159	 status_filter: ["normal"]
 160	```
 161	
 162	## 智能分类
 163	
 164	程序会根据公告标题自动分类到不同文件夹：
 165	
 166	```
 167	HKEX/
 168	├── 00001/
 169	│ ├── 01_业绩报告/
 170	│ │ ├── 年报/
 171	│ │ ├── 中期报告/
 172	│ │ └── 季报/
 173	│ ├── 02_交易公告/
 174	│ │ ├── 须予披露交易/
 175	│ │ └── 关连交易/
 176	│ └── 03_公司管治/
 177	│ ├── 股东大会/
 178	│ └── 董事会决议/
 179	```
 180	
 181	## 日志
 182	
 183	程序会生成详细的日志文件 `hkex_downloader.log`：
 184	
 185	```
 186	2025-07-17 09:57:07,832 - INFO - 开始下载任务: 默认下载任务
 187	2025-07-17 09:57:07,832 - INFO - 股票代码: 00081, 日期范围: 2024-01-01 至 2025-07-17
 188	2025-07-17 09:57:08,055 - INFO - 找到 105 个符合条件的公告
 189	```
 190	
 191	## 故障排除
 192	
 193	### 常见问题
 194	
 195	1. **网络连接错误**
 196	 - 检查网络连接
 197	 - 确认港交所网站可访问
 198	
 199	2. **配置文件错误**
 200	 ```bash
 201	 python main.py --check-config
 202	 ```
 203	
 204	3. **数据库连接失败**
 205	 ```bash
 206	 python main.py --test-db
 207	 ```
 208	
 209	4. **文件权限问题**
 210	 - 确保保存路径有写入权限
 211	 - 检查磁盘空间
 212	
 213	## 文件结构
 214	
 215	```
 216	hkexann/
 217	├── main.py # 主程序文件
 218	├── config.yaml # 配置文件
 219	├── config_template.yaml # 配置模板
 220	├── hkex_downloader.log # 日志文件
 221	├── README.md # 说明文档
 222	└── requirements.txt # 依赖列表
 223	```
 224	
 225	## 贡献
 226	
 227	欢迎提交Issue和Pull Request！
 228	
 229	## 许可证
 230	
 231	MIT License
 232	
 233	**注意**: 请遵守港交所网站的使用条款，合理使用本工具。

 1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
 2	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
 3	"""
 4	HKEX 公告下载器 - 命令行版本
 5	作者：Victor Suen
 6	版本：2.0（移除GUI版本）
 7	"""
 8	
 9	import requests
 10	import json
 11	import os
 12	import sys
 13	import yaml
 14	import argparse
 15	import logging
 16	import time
 17	import pymysql
 18	import re
 19	from datetime import datetime, timedelta
 20	from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
 21	from typing import List, Tuple, Dict, Any
 22	from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional, Tuple
 23	
 24	
 25	class DatabaseManager:
 26	 """数据库管理器"""
 27	
 28	 def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
 29	 self.config = config
 30	 self.connection = None
 31	 self.is_connected = False
 32	
 33	 def connect(self) -> bool:
 34	 """连接数据库"""
 35	 try:
 36	 db_config = self.config.get('database', {})
 37	 if not db_config.get('enabled', False):
 38	 logging.info("数据库功能未启用")
 39	 return False
 40	
 41	 connection_params = {
 42	 'host': db_config.get('host', 'localhost'),
 43	 'port': db_config.get('port', 3306),
 44	 'user': db_config.get('user', 'root'),
 45	 'password': db_config.get('password', ''),
 46	 'database': db_config.get('database', 'ccass'),
 47	 'charset': db_config.get('connection', {}).get('charset', 'utf8mb4'),
 48	 'autocommit': db_config.get('connection', {}).get('autocommit', True),
 49	 'connect_timeout': db_config.get('connection', {}).get('connect_timeout', 30),
 50	 'read_timeout': db_config.get('connection', {}).get('read_timeout', 30)
 51	 }
 52	
 53	 self.connection = pymysql.connect(**connection_params)
 54	 self.is_connected = True
 55	 logging.info(
 56	 f"成功连接到数据库: {connection_params['host']}:{connection_params['port']}/{connection_params['database']}")
 57	 return True
 58	
 59	 except Exception as e:
 60	 logging.error(f"数据库连接失败: {str(e)}")
 61	 self.is_connected = False
 62	 return False
 63	
 64	 def disconnect(self):
 65	 """断开数据库连接"""
 66	 if self.connection and self.is_connected:
 67	 try:
 68	 self.connection.close()
 69	 self.is_connected = False
 70	 logging.info("数据库连接已断开")
 71	 except Exception as e:
 72	 logging.warning(f"断开数据库连接时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 73	
 74	 def test_connection(self) -> bool:
 75	 """测试数据库连接"""
 76	 if self.connect():
 77	 try:
 78	 if self.connection:
 79	 with self.connection.cursor() as cursor:
 80	 cursor.execute("SELECT 1")
 81	 result = cursor.fetchone()
 82	 logging.info("数据库连接测试成功")
 83	 return True
 84	 except Exception as e:
 85	 logging.error(f"数据库连接测试失败: {str(e)}")
 86	 return False
 87	 finally:
 88	 self.disconnect()
 89	 return False
 90	
 91	 def execute_query(self, query: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
 92	 """执行SQL查询"""
 93	 if not self.is_connected and not self.connect():
 94	 raise Exception("无法连接到数据库")
 95	
 96	 if not self.connection:
 97	 raise Exception("数据库连接无效")
 98	
 99	 try:
 100	 max_retries = self.config.get('database', {}).get('connection', {}).get('max_retries', 3)
 101	
 102	 for attempt in range(max_retries):
 103	 try:
 104	 cursor = self.connection.cursor()
 105	 cursor.execute(query)
 106	
 107	 # 获取列名
 108	 columns = [desc[0] for desc in cursor.description] if cursor.description else []
 109	
 110	 # 获取数据并转换为字典列表
 111	 rows = cursor.fetchall()
 112	 results = []
 113	 for row in rows:
 114	 row_dict = {}
 115	 for i, value in enumerate(row):
 116	 if i < len(columns):
 117	 row_dict[columns[i]] = value
 118	 results.append(row_dict)
 119	
 120	 cursor.close()
 121	 logging.info(f"SQL查询成功，返回 {len(results)} 条记录")
 122	 return results
 123	
 124	 except pymysql.MySQLError as e:
 125	 if attempt < max_retries - 1:
 126	 logging.warning(f"SQL查询失败，第 {attempt + 1} 次重试: {str(e)}")
 127	 time.sleep(1)
 128	 # 尝试重新连接
 129	 self.disconnect()
 130	 if not self.connect():
 131	 break
 132	 continue
 133	 else:
 134	 raise Exception(f"SQL查询失败: {str(e)}")
 135	
 136	 # 如果所有重试都失败了
 137	 raise Exception("SQL查询失败: 超过最大重试次数")
 138	
 139	 except Exception as e:
 140	 logging.error(f"执行SQL查询时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 141	 raise
 142	
 143	 def get_stock_codes(self, query: str = None) -> List[str]:
 144	 """获取股票代码列表"""
 145	 try:
 146	 if not query:
 147	 # 使用默认查询
 148	 db_config = self.config.get('database', {})
 149	 table = db_config.get('default_table', 'issue')
 150	 stock_code_field = db_config.get('fields', {}).get('stock_code', 'stockCode')
 151	 stock_name_field = db_config.get('fields', {}).get('stock_name', 'stockName')
 152	 status_field = db_config.get('fields', {}).get('status', 'status')
 153	 status_filter = db_config.get('status_filter', ['normal'])
 154	
 155	 # 构建状态过滤条件
 156	 if len(status_filter) == 1:
 157	 status_condition = f"{status_field} = '{status_filter[0]}'"
 158	 else:
 159	 status_values = "', '".join(status_filter)
 160	 status_condition = f"{status_field} IN ('{status_values}')"
 161	
 162	 query = f"SELECT {stock_code_field}, {stock_name_field} FROM {table} WHERE {status_condition}"
 163	
 164	 results = self.execute_query(query)
 165	
 166	 # 提取股票代码
 167	 stock_codes = []
 168	 for row in results:
 169	 # 使用配置的字段映射获取股票代码
 170	 code = self._get_field_value(row, 'stock_code', db_config)
 171	 if not code:
 172	 # 回退到尝试不同的字段名
 173	 for key in ['stockCode', 'stock_code', 'code', 'symbol']:
 174	 if key in row and row[key]:
 175	 code = str(row[key]).strip()
 176	 break
 177	
 178	 if code and code.isdigit() and len(code) <= 8: # 适配varchar(8)
 179	 # 智能格式化股票代码
 180	 formatted_code = self._format_stock_code(code)
 181	 if formatted_code:
 182	 stock_codes.append(formatted_code)
 183	 else:
 184	 logging.warning(f"跳过无效的股票代码: {code}")
 185	 else:
 186	 logging.warning(f"跳过无效的股票代码: {row}")
 187	
 188	 logging.info(f"从数据库获取到 {len(stock_codes)} 个有效股票代码")
 189	 return stock_codes
 190	
 191	 except Exception as e:
 192	 logging.error(f"获取股票代码失败: {str(e)}")
 193	 return []
 194	
 195	 def __enter__(self):
 196	 """上下文管理器入口"""
 197	 self.connect()
 198	 return self
 199	
 200	 def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
 201	 """上下文管理器出口"""
 202	 self.disconnect()
 203	
 204	 def _get_field_value(self, row, field_type, db_config):
 205	 """根据配置获取字段值"""
 206	 field_name = db_config.get('fields', {}).get(field_type)
 207	 if field_name and field_name in row and row[field_name]:
 208	 return str(row[field_name]).strip()
 209	 return None
 210	
 211	 def _format_stock_code(self, code):
 212	 """智能格式化股票代码"""
 213	 try:
 214	 # 去除前导零后重新格式化
 215	 code_int = int(code)
 216	 if code_int > 0:
 217	 # 标准5位格式
 218	 return str(code_int).zfill(5)
 219	 return None
 220	 except ValueError:
 221	 return None
 222	
 223	
 224	class AnnouncementClassifier:
 225	 """公告分类识别器"""
 226	
 227	 def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
 228	 self.config = config
 229	 self.categories = config.get('announcement_categories', {})
 230	 self.enabled = self.categories.get('enabled', True)
 231	
 232	 # 初始化繁简体转换器
 233	 try:
 234	 import opencc
 235	 self.t2s_converter = opencc.OpenCC('t2s') # 繁体转简体
 236	 self.s2t_converter = opencc.OpenCC('s2t') # 简体转繁体
 237	 self.opencc_available = True
 238	 except ImportError:
 239	 print("警告：OpenCC库未安装，繁简体转换功能将被禁用")
 240	 self.opencc_available = False
 241	 self.t2s_converter = None
 242	 self.s2t_converter = None
 243	
 244	 def _convert_text(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 245	 """
 246	 将文本转换为繁简体版本
 247	
 248	 Args:
 249	 text: 原始文本
 250	
 251	 Returns:
 252	 List[str]: 包含原文、繁体、简体的文本列表
 253	 """
 254	 variants = [text]
 255	
 256	 if self.opencc_available and self.s2t_converter and self.t2s_converter:
 257	 try:
 258	 # 添加繁体版本
 259	 traditional = self.s2t_converter.convert(text)
 260	 if traditional != text:
 261	 variants.append(traditional)
 262	
 263	 # 添加简体版本
 264	 simplified = self.t2s_converter.convert(text)
 265	 if simplified != text:
 266	 variants.append(simplified)
 267	 except Exception as e:
 268	 print(f"繁简体转换失败: {e}")
 269	
 270	 return variants
 271	
 272	 def classify_announcement(self, title: str) -> Tuple[str, str]:
 273	 """
 274	 根据公告标题分类公告
 275	
 276	 Args:
 277	 title: 公告标题
 278	
 279	 Returns:
 280	 Tuple[str, str]: (主分类, 子分类)
 281	 """
 282	 if not self.enabled:
 283	 return "99_其他", "其他"
 284	
 285	 # 清理标题，移除特殊字符但保留中文
 286	 clean_title = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u4e00-\u9fff\u3400-\u4dbf]', '', title)
 287	
 288	 # 生成标题的繁简体版本
 289	 title_variants = self._convert_text(title.lower())
 290	 clean_title_variants = self._convert_text(clean_title.lower())
 291	
 292	 # 按优先级排序分类
 293	 best_match = None
 294	 best_priority = float('inf')
 295	
 296	 # 遍历一级分类
 297	 for main_category, main_config in self.categories.items():
 298	 if main_category == 'enabled':
 299	 continue
 300	
 301	 # 检查是否是新的三层结构
 302	 if isinstance(main_config, dict) and 'code' in main_config:
 303	 # 新的三层结构：一级分类 -> 二级分组 -> 三级分类
 304	 for group_name, group_config in main_config.items():
 305	 if group_name in ['code', 'name', 'count', 'keywords', 'priority']:
 306	 continue
 307	
 308	 if isinstance(group_config, dict):
 309	 # 检查是否有 subcategories
 310	 if 'subcategories' in group_config:
 311	 subcategories = group_config['subcategories']
 312	 for sub_category, config in subcategories.items():
 313	 if isinstance(config, dict):
 314	 keywords = config.get('keywords', [])
 315	 priority = config.get('priority', 5)
 316	
 317	 # 检查关键词匹配
 318	 if self._check_keyword_match(keywords, title_variants, clean_title_variants):
 319	 if priority < best_priority:
 320	 best_match = (main_category, sub_category)
 321	 best_priority = priority
 322	 else:
 323	 # 直接的子分类
 324	 keywords = group_config.get('keywords', [])
 325	 priority = group_config.get('priority', 5)
 326	
 327	 if self._check_keyword_match(keywords, title_variants, clean_title_variants):
 328	 if priority < best_priority:
 329	 best_match = (main_category, group_name)
 330	 best_priority = priority
 331	 else:
 332	 # 旧的二层结构：主分类 -> 子分类
 333	 if isinstance(main_config, dict):
 334	 for sub_category, config in main_config.items():
 335	 if isinstance(config, dict):
 336	 keywords = config.get('keywords', [])
 337	 priority = config.get('priority', 5)
 338	
 339	 if self._check_keyword_match(keywords, title_variants, clean_title_variants):
 340	 if priority < best_priority:
 341	 best_match = (main_category, sub_category)
 342	 best_priority = priority
 343	
 344	 # 如果没有匹配，返回其他分类
 345	 if best_match is None:
 346	 return "99_其他", "其他"
 347	
 348	 return best_match
 349	
 350	 def _check_keyword_match(self, keywords: List[str], title_variants: List[str],
 351	 clean_title_variants: List[str]) -> bool:
 352	 """
 353	 检查关键词是否匹配
 354	
 355	 Args:
 356	 keywords: 关键词列表
 357	 title_variants: 标题变体列表
 358	 clean_title_variants: 清理后的标题变体列表
 359	
 360	 Returns:
 361	 bool: 是否匹配
 362	 """
 363	 for keyword in keywords:
 364	 # 生成关键词的繁简体版本
 365	 keyword_variants = self._convert_text(keyword.lower())
 366	
 367	 # 检查所有变体组合（使用更宽松的匹配）
 368	 for title_var in title_variants + clean_title_variants:
 369	 for keyword_var in keyword_variants:
 370	 # 使用包含匹配和部分匹配
 371	 if (keyword_var in title_var or
 372	 any(kw_part in title_var for kw_part in keyword_var.split() if len(kw_part) > 1)):
 373	 return True
 374	 return False
 375	
 376	 def get_folder_path(self, main_category: str, sub_category: str) -> str:
 377	 """
 378	 获取分类对应的文件夹路径
 379	
 380	 Args:
 381	 main_category: 主分类
 382	 sub_category: 子分类
 383	
 384	 Returns:
 385	 str: 文件夹路径
 386	 """
 387	 return os.path.join(main_category, sub_category)
 388	
 389	 def get_classification_stats(self, announcements: List[Dict]) -> Dict[str, int]:
 390	 """
 391	 获取公告分类统计
 392	
 393	 Args:
 394	 announcements: 公告列表
 395	
 396	 Returns:
 397	 Dict[str, int]: 分类统计
 398	 """
 399	 stats = {}
 400	
 401	 for ann in announcements:
 402	 main_cat, sub_cat = self.classify_announcement(ann['title'])
 403	 full_category = f"{main_cat}/{sub_cat}"
 404	 stats[full_category] = stats.get(full_category, 0) + 1
 405	
 406	 return stats
 407	
 408	
 409	class ConfigManager:
 410	 """配置管理器"""
 411	
 412	 def __init__(self, config_file: str = "config.yaml"):
 413	 self.config_file = config_file
 414	 self.config = self.load_config()
 415	
 416	 def load_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 417	 """加载配置文件"""
 418	 if not os.path.exists(self.config_file):
 419	 self.create_default_config()
 420	
 421	 try:
 422	 with open(self.config_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 423	 config = yaml.safe_load(f)
 424	
 425	 # 验证配置文件结构
 426	 self.validate_config(config)
 427	 return config
 428	
 429	 except Exception as e:
 430	 logging.error(f"加载配置文件失败: {e}")
 431	 print(f"配置文件加载失败，将使用默认配置: {e}")
 432	 return self.get_default_config()
 433	
 434	 def get_default_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 435	 """获取默认配置"""
 436	 return {
 437	 'settings': {
 438	 'save_path': os.path.join(os.path.expanduser("~"), "Desktop"),
 439	 'filename_length': 220,
 440	 'language': 'zh',
 441	 'max_results': 500,
 442	 'verbose_logging': True,
 443	 'log_file': 'hkex_downloader.log'
 444	 },
 445	 'date_range': {
 446	 'start_date': '2024-01-01',
 447	 'end_date': 'today'
 448	 },
 449	 'download_tasks': [],
 450	 'advanced': {
 451	 'retry_attempts': 3,
 452	 'request_delay': 1,
 453	 'timeout': 30,
 454	 'overwrite_existing': False,
 455	 'user_agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/101.0.4951.67 Safari/537.36'
 456	 }
 457	 }
 458	
 459	 def create_default_config(self):
 460	 """创建默认配置文件"""
 461	 default_config = self.get_default_config()
 462	 default_config['download_tasks'] = [
 463	 {
 464	 'name': '默认下载任务',
 465	 'stock_code': '00081',
 466	 'start_date': '2024-01-01',
 467	 'end_date': 'today',
 468	 'keywords': [],
 469	 'enabled': True
 470	 }
 471	 ]
 472	
 473	 try:
 474	 with open(self.config_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 475	 yaml.dump(default_config, f, default_flow_style=False,
 476	 allow_unicode=True, indent=2)
 477	 logging.info(f"已创建默认配置文件: {self.config_file}")
 478	 except Exception as e:
 479	 logging.error(f"创建配置文件失败: {e}")
 480	
 481	 def validate_config(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
 482	 """验证配置文件格式"""
 483	 required_sections = ['settings', 'date_range', 'advanced']
 484	 for section in required_sections:
 485	 if section not in config:
 486	 raise ValueError(f"配置文件缺少必需的部分: {section}")
 487	
 488	 def get(self, section: str, key: str = None, default=None):
 489	 """获取配置值"""
 490	 if key is None:
 491	 return self.config.get(section, default)
 492	 return self.config.get(section, {}).get(key, default)
 493	
 494	 def parse_date(self, date_str: str) -> datetime:
 495	 """解析日期字符串"""
 496	 if date_str.lower() == 'today':
 497	 return datetime.now()
 498	 elif date_str.lower() == 'yesterday':
 499	 return datetime.now() - timedelta(days=1)
 500	 else:
 501	 try:
 502	 return datetime.strptime(date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
 503	 except ValueError:
 504	 raise ValueError(f"无效的日期格式: {date_str}，请使用 YYYY-MM-DD 格式")
 505	
 506	 def get_database_manager(self) -> Optional[DatabaseManager]:
 507	 """获取数据库管理器实例"""
 508	 if not self.config.get('database', {}).get('enabled', False):
 509	 return None
 510	 return DatabaseManager(self.config)
 511	
 512	 def test_database_connection(self) -> bool:
 513	 """测试数据库连接"""
 514	 db_manager = self.get_database_manager()
 515	 if not db_manager:
 516	 logging.info("数据库功能未启用")
 517	 return False
 518	 return db_manager.test_connection()
 519	
 520	 def get_stocks_from_database(self, query: str = None) -> List[str]:
 521	 """从数据库获取股票代码列表"""
 522	 db_manager = self.get_database_manager()
 523	 if not db_manager:
 524	 logging.warning("数据库功能未启用，无法获取股票列表")
 525	 return []
 526	
 527	 try:
 528	 with db_manager:
 529	 return db_manager.get_stock_codes(query)
 530	 except Exception as e:
 531	 logging.error(f"从数据库获取股票代码失败: {str(e)}")
 532	 return []

 535	class HKEXDownloader:
 536	 """HKEX公告下载器核心类"""
 537	
 538	 def __init__(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):
 539	 self.config = config_manager
 540	 self.headers = {
 541	 "User-Agent": self.config.get('advanced', 'user_agent')
 542	 }
 543	 self.session = requests.Session()
 544	 self.session.headers.update(self.headers)
 545	
 546	 # 设置超时和重试
 547	 self.timeout = self.config.get('advanced', 'timeout', 30)
 548	 self.retry_attempts = self.config.get('advanced', 'retry_attempts', 3)
 549	 self.request_delay = self.config.get('advanced', 'request_delay', 1)
 550	
 551	 # 初始化公告分类器
 552	 self.classifier = AnnouncementClassifier(self.config.config)
 553	
 554	 def get_stockid(self, stockcode: str) -> str:
 555	 """根据股票代码获取股票ID"""
 556	 for attempt in range(self.retry_attempts):
 557	 try:
 558	 url = f'https://www1.hkexnews.hk/search/prefix.do?&callback=callback&lang=ZH&type=A&name={stockcode}&market=SEHK&_=1653821865437'
 559	 response = self.session.get(url, timeout=self.timeout)
 560	
 561	 # 处理 JSONP 响应
 562	 data = response.text[9:-4]
 563	 data_json = json.loads(data)
 564	
 565	 if 'stockInfo' not in data_json or not data_json['stockInfo']:
 566	 raise ValueError(f"未找到股票代码 {stockcode} 对应的信息")
 567	
 568	 stockid = data_json["stockInfo"][0]['stockId']
 569	 logging.info(f"股票代码 {stockcode} 对应的 StockID: {stockid}")
 570	 return stockid
 571	
 572	 except Exception as e:
 573	 if attempt < self.retry_attempts - 1:
 574	 logging.warning(f"获取股票信息失败，第 {attempt + 1} 次重试: {e}")
 575	 time.sleep(self.request_delay)
 576	 continue
 577	 else:
 578	 raise Exception(f"获取股票 {stockcode} 信息失败: {str(e)}")
 579	
 580	 def get_announcement_list(self, stockcode: str, start_date: datetime,
 581	 end_date: datetime, keywords: List[str] = None) -> List[Dict]:
 582	 """获取公告列表"""
 583	 try:
 584	 # 获取 stockId
 585	 stockid = self.get_stockid(stockcode)
 586	
 587	 # 处理关键字
 588	 search_keyword = keywords[-1] if keywords else ""
 589	
 590	 # 准备日期格式
 591	 start_date_str = start_date.strftime("%Y%m%d")
 592	 end_date_str = end_date.strftime("%Y%m%d")
 593	
 594	 # 获取语言和最大结果数设置
 595	 language = self.config.get('settings', 'language', 'zh')
 596	 max_results = self.config.get('settings', 'max_results', 500)
 597	
 598	 # 构建完整URL
 599	 url = f'https://www1.hkexnews.hk/search/titleSearchServlet.do?sortDir=0&sortByOptions=DateTime&category=0&market=SEHK&stockId={stockid}&documentType=-1&fromDate={start_date_str}&toDate={end_date_str}&title={search_keyword}&searchType=0&t1code=-2&t2Gcode=-2&t2code=-2&rowRange={max_results}&lang={language}'
 600	
 601	 logging.info(f"搜索URL: {url}")
 602	
 603	 # 发送请求
 604	 response = self.session.get(url, timeout=self.timeout)
 605	
 606	 if response.status_code != 200:
 607	 raise Exception(f"无法连接到港交所网站 (状态码: {response.status_code})")
 608	
 609	 # 处理响应数据
 610	 try:
 611	 data = response.text
 612	 # 清理响应文本
 613	 data = data.replace('"[{', '[{').replace('}]"', '}]').replace('\\', "").replace('u2013', "-").replace(
 614	 'u0026', "-")
 615	 data_json = json.loads(data)
 616	
 617	 if not data_json or 'result' not in data_json or not data_json['result']:
 618	 logging.warning("未找到符合条件的公告")
 619	 return []
 620	
 621	 announcements = []
 622	 for item in data_json['result']:
 623	 try:
 624	 # 获取标题
 625	 title = item['TITLE'].replace('/', "-")
 626	
 627	 # 获取 PDF 链接
 628	 pdflink = item['FILE_LINK']
 629	 pdf_link = "https://www1.hkexnews.hk" + pdflink
 630	
 631	 # 处理日期
 632	 anndate = item['DATE_TIME']
 633	 anndate = anndate[:10].replace('/', "-")
 634	 date_object = datetime.strptime(anndate, "%d-%m-%Y")
 635	 formatted_date = date_object.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
 636	
 637	 announcements.append({
 638	 'date': formatted_date,
 639	 'title': title,
 640	 'link': pdf_link
 641	 })
 642	
 643	 except Exception as e:
 644	 logging.warning(f"处理公告项目时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 645	 continue
 646	
 647	 logging.info(f"找到 {len(announcements)} 个符合条件的公告")
 648	 return announcements
 649	
 650	 except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 651	 logging.error(f"JSON 解析错误: {str(e)}")
 652	 raise Exception("服务器响应格式无效")
 653	
 654	 except Exception as e:
 655	 raise Exception(f"获取公告列表时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 656	
 657	 def download_announcements(self, task: Dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, int]:
 658	 """下载公告文件"""
 659	 try:
 660	 # 检查是否从数据库获取股票
 661	 if task.get('from_database', False):
 662	 return self._download_from_database(task)
 663	
 664	 # 解析任务参数
 665	 stockcode = task.get('stock_code')
 666	 if not stockcode:
 667	 raise ValueError("任务配置缺少 stock_code")
 668	
 669	 return self._download_single_stock(task, stockcode)
 670	
 671	 except Exception as e:
 672	 raise Exception(f"下载过程中出现错误: {str(e)}")
 673	
 674	 def _download_from_database(self, task: Dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, int]:
 675	 """从数据库获取股票列表并下载"""
 676	 query = task.get('query')
 677	 stock_codes = self.config.get_stocks_from_database(query)
 678	
 679	 if not stock_codes:
 680	 logging.warning("从数据库未获取到任何股票代码")
 681	 return "", 0
 682	
 683	 logging.info(
 684	 f"从数据库获取到 {len(stock_codes)} 个股票代码: {', '.join(stock_codes[:5])}{'...' if len(stock_codes) > 5 else ''}")
 685	
 686	 total_downloaded = 0
 687	 base_save_path = self.config.get('settings', 'save_path')
 688	
 689	 for i, stock_code in enumerate(stock_codes, 1):
 690	 try:
 691	 logging.info(f"[{i}/{len(stock_codes)}] 处理股票: {stock_code}")
 692	
 693	 # 创建临时任务配置
 694	 stock_task = task.copy()
 695	 stock_task['stock_code'] = stock_code
 696	 stock_task.pop('from_database', None)
 697	 stock_task.pop('query', None)
 698	
 699	 save_path, count = self._download_single_stock(stock_task, stock_code)
 700	 total_downloaded += count
 701	
 702	 if count > 0:
 703	 logging.info(f"✓ 股票 {stock_code} 下载完成: {count} 个文件")
 704	 else:
 705	 logging.info(f"- 股票 {stock_code} 无新文件")
 706	
 707	 except Exception as e:
 708	 logging.error(f"✗ 股票 {stock_code} 下载失败: {str(e)}")
 709	 continue
 710	
 711	 logging.info(f"数据库任务完成！总共下载 {total_downloaded} 个文件")
 712	 return os.path.join(base_save_path, 'HKEX'), total_downloaded
 713	
 714	 def _download_single_stock(self, task: Dict[str, Any], stockcode: str) -> tuple[str, int]:
 715	 """下载单个股票的公告"""
 716	 # 解析日期
 717	 start_date = self.config.parse_date(task.get('start_date', '2024-01-01'))
 718	 end_date = self.config.parse_date(task.get('end_date', 'today'))
 719	
 720	 keywords = task.get('keywords', [])
 721	
 722	 logging.info(f"开始下载任务: {task.get('name', '未命名任务')}")
 723	 logging.info(
 724	 f"股票代码: {stockcode}, 日期范围: {start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')} 至 {end_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}")
 725	
 726	 # 获取公告列表
 727	 announcements = self.get_announcement_list(stockcode, start_date, end_date, keywords)
 728	
 729	 if not announcements:
 730	 logging.warning("未找到符合条件的公告")
 731	 return "", 0
 732	
 733	 # 创建保存目录
 734	 save_path = self.config.get('settings', 'save_path')
 735	 base_path = os.path.join(save_path, 'HKEX', stockcode)
 736	
 737	 if not os.path.exists(base_path):
 738	 os.makedirs(base_path)
 739	 logging.info(f"创建保存目录: {base_path}")
 740	
 741	 # 获取分类统计
 742	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 743	 classification_stats = self.classifier.get_classification_stats(announcements)
 744	 logging.info(f"公告分类统计: {classification_stats}")
 745	
 746	 # 下载公告
 747	 download_count = 0
 748	 filename_length = self.config.get('settings', 'filename_length', 220)
 749	 overwrite = self.config.get('advanced', 'overwrite_existing', False)
 750	
 751	 total_count = len(announcements)
 752	
 753	 for i, ann in enumerate(announcements, 1):
 754	 try:
 755	 # 使用分类器确定文件保存路径
 756	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 757	 main_category, sub_category = self.classifier.classify_announcement(ann['title'])
 758	 category_path = self.classifier.get_folder_path(main_category, sub_category)
 759	 savepath = os.path.join(base_path, category_path)
 760	 else:
 761	 savepath = base_path
 762	
 763	 # 确保分类文件夹存在
 764	 if not os.path.exists(savepath):
 765	 os.makedirs(savepath)
 766	 logging.info(f"创建分类目录: {savepath}")
 767	
 768	 filepath = os.path.join(
 769	 savepath,
 770	 f"{ann['date']}_{stockcode}-{ann['title'][:filename_length]}.pdf"
 771	 )
 772	
 773	 # 检查文件是否已存在
 774	 if os.path.exists(filepath) and not overwrite:
 775	 logging.info(f"跳过已存在的文件 ({i}/{total_count}): {os.path.basename(filepath)}")
 776	 continue
 777	
 778	 # 显示分类信息
 779	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 780	 logging.info(f"正在下载 ({i}/{total_count}) [{main_category}/{sub_category}]: {ann['title']}")
 781	 else:
 782	 logging.info(f"正在下载 ({i}/{total_count}): {ann['title']}")
 783	
 784	 response = self.session.get(ann['link'], timeout=self.timeout)
 785	 if response.status_code == 200:
 786	 with open(filepath, 'wb') as f:
 787	 f.write(response.content)
 788	 download_count += 1
 789	 logging.info(f"✓ 成功下载: {os.path.basename(filepath)}")
 790	 else:
 791	 logging.warning(f"下载失败 (HTTP {response.status_code}): {ann['title']}")
 792	
 793	 # 请求间隔
 794	 if self.request_delay > 0:
 795	 time.sleep(self.request_delay)
 796	
 797	 except Exception as e:
 798	 logging.error(f"下载文件时发生错误: {ann['title']} - {str(e)}")
 799	 continue
 800	
 801	 logging.info(f"任务完成！成功下载 {download_count}/{total_count} 个文件到 {base_path}")
 802	 return base_path, download_count

 812	 def setup_logging(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):
 813	 """设置日志"""
 814	 log_level = logging.INFO if config_manager.get('settings', 'verbose_logging', True) else logging.WARNING
 815	 log_file = config_manager.get('settings', 'log_file')
 816	
 817	 # 配置日志格式
 818	 log_format = '%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
 819	
 820	 handlers = [logging.StreamHandler()]
 821	 if log_file:
 822	 handlers.append(logging.FileHandler(log_file, encoding='utf-8'))
 823	
 824	 logging.basicConfig(
 825	 level=log_level,
 826	 format=log_format,
 827	 handlers=handlers
 828	 )

 830	 def create_parser(self) -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
 831	 """创建命令行参数解析器"""
 832	 parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 833	 description='HKEX 公告下载器 - 命令行版本',
 834	 formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
 835	 epilog="""
 836	使用示例:
 837	 %(prog)s # 使用配置文件中的任务
 838	 %(prog)s -s 00001 # 下载单个股票的所有公告
 839	 %(prog)s -s 00001 -k "财务报告" # 下载指定关键字的公告
 840	 %(prog)s -s 00001 --start 2024-01-01 # 指定开始日期
 841	 %(prog)s --config my_config.yaml # 使用指定的配置文件
 842	 %(prog)s --check-config # 检查配置文件
 843	 """)
 844	
 845	 parser.add_argument('-c', '--config',
 846	 default='config.yaml',
 847	 help='配置文件路径 (默认: config.yaml)')
 848	
 849	 parser.add_argument('-s', '--stock-code',
 850	 help='股票代码 (5位数字)')
 851	
 852	 parser.add_argument('-k', '--keywords',
 853	 nargs='*',
 854	 help='搜索关键字')
 855	
 856	 parser.add_argument('--start',
 857	 help='开始日期 (YYYY-MM-DD)')
 858	
 859	 parser.add_argument('--end',
 860	 help='结束日期 (YYYY-MM-DD 或 today)')
 861	
 862	 parser.add_argument('--save-path',
 863	 help='保存路径')
 864	
 865	 parser.add_argument('--check-config',
 866	 action='store_true',
 867	 help='检查配置文件格式')
 868	
 869	 parser.add_argument('--list-tasks',
 870	 action='store_true',
 871	 help='列出配置文件中的所有任务')
 872	
 873	 parser.add_argument('--run-task',
 874	 help='运行指定名称的任务')
 875	
 876	 parser.add_argument('-v', '--verbose',
 877	 action='store_true',
 878	 help='启用详细输出')
 879	
 880	 # 数据库相关参数
 881	 parser.add_argument('--test-db',
 882	 action='store_true',
 883	 help='测试数据库连接')
 884	
 885	 parser.add_argument('--db-stocks',
 886	 action='store_true',
 887	 help='从数据库获取所有股票代码并下载')
 888	
 889	 parser.add_argument('--db-query',
 890	 help='自定义数据库查询语句')
 891	
 892	 return parser

 894	 def check_config(self, config_file: str):
 895	 """检查配置文件"""
 896	 try:
 897	 config_manager = ConfigManager(config_file)
 898	 print(f"✓ 配置文件 {config_file} 格式正确")
 899	
 900	 # 显示配置摘要

 905	
 906	 tasks = config_manager.get('download_tasks') or []
 907	 if isinstance(tasks, list):
 908	 enabled_tasks = [t for t in tasks if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('enabled', True)]

 911	 print(f" 下载任务: 配置格式错误 (应为列表格式)")

 913	 except Exception as e:

 994	 def run_named_task(self, task_name: str, config_manager: ConfigManager):
 995	 """运行指定名称的任务"""
 996	 tasks = config_manager.get('download_tasks') or []
 997	 target_task = None
 998	
 999	 for task in tasks:
 1000	 if task.get('name') == task_name:
 1001	 target_task = task
 1002	 break
 1003	
 1004	 if not target_task:
 1005	 print(f"未找到名称为 '{task_name}' 的任务")
 1006	 sys.exit(1)
 1007	
 1008	 if not target_task.get('enabled', True):
 1009	 print(f"任务 '{task_name}' 已禁用")
 1010	 sys.exit(1)
 1011	
 1012	 downloader = HKEXDownloader(config_manager)
 1013	
 1014	 try:
 1015	 print(f"执行任务: {task_name}")
 1016	 save_path, count = downloader.download_announcements(target_task)
 1017	 if count > 0:
 1018	 print(f"\n✓ 任务完成！成功下载 {count} 个文件到 {save_path}")
 1019	 else:
 1020	 print("\n⚠ 未找到符合条件的公告")
 1021	 except Exception as e:
 1022	 print(f"\n✗ 任务失败: {e}")
 1023	 sys.exit(1)

 1092

 1099	 if args.db_stocks:

 1101	 return
 1102	
 1103	 # 运行指定名称的任务
 1104	 if args.run_task:
 1105	 self.run_named_task(args.run_task, self.config_manager)
 1106	 return
 1107	
 1108	 # 运行单个股票下载任务
 1109	 if args.stock_code:
 1110	 if not args.stock_code.isdigit() or len(args.stock_code) != 5:
 1111	 print("错误: 股票代码必须为5位数字")
 1112	 sys.exit(1)
 1113	 self.run_single_task(args, self.config_manager)
 1114	 return
 1115	
 1116	 # 运行配置文件中的任务
 1117	 self.run_config_tasks(self.config_manager)

## 计划

我将为项目添加守护者进程模式，包括以下功能：

1. **守护者进程核心类** - 创建一个新的 `DaemonManager` 类来管理守护者进程
2. **调度器功能** - 使用 `schedule` 库实现定时任务调度
3. **配置扩展** - 在配置文件中添加守护者进程相关设置
4. **命令行参数** - 添加启动、停止、状态查看等守护者进程命令
5. **日志和监控** - 增强日志记录，添加运行状态监控
6. **进程管理** - 实现进程的启动、停止、重启功能
7. **错误处理和恢复** - 添加异常处理和自动恢复机制

### 需要修改的文件：
- `main.py` - 添加守护者进程相关类和命令行参数
- `config.yaml` - 添加守护者进程配置
- `requirements.txt` - 添加新的依赖包

### 需要创建的文件：
- `daemon.py` - 守护者进程管理模块（可选，也可以集成到main.py中）

让我开始实现：

让我制定一个详细的计划：

## 计划

我将为项目添加守护者进程模式，包括以下功能：

1. **守护者进程核心类** - 创建一个新的 `DaemonManager` 类来管理守护者进程
2. **调度器功能** - 使用 `schedule` 库实现定时任务调度
3. **配置扩展** - 在配置文件中添加守护者进程相关设置
4. **命令行参数** - 添加启动、停止、状态查看等守护者进程命令
5. **日志和监控** - 增强日志记录，添加运行状态监控
6. **进程管理** - 实现进程的启动、停止、重启功能
7. **错误处理和恢复** - 添加异常处理和自动恢复机制

### 需要修改的文件：
- `main.py` - 添加守护者进程相关类和命令行参数
- `config.yaml` - 添加守护者进程配置
- `requirements.txt` - 添加新的依赖包

### 需要创建的文件：
- `daemon.py` - 守护者进程管理模块（可选，也可以集成到main.py中）

让我开始实现：

\u8bbe\u7f6e\u4fe1\u53f7\u5904\u7406\n signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, self._signal_handler)\n signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, self._signal_handler)\n \n # \u6ce8\u518c\u9000\u51fa\u5904\u7406\n atexit.register(self._cleanup)\n \n def _signal_handler(self, signum, frame):\n \"\"\"\u4fe1\u53f7\u5904\u7406\u5668\"\"\"\n logging.info(f\"\u6536\u5230\u4fe1\u53f7 {signum}\uff0c\u51c6\u5907\u505c\u6b62\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b...\")\n self.should_stop = True\n \n def _cleanup(self):\n \"\"\"\u6e05\u7406\u8d44\u6e90\"\"\"\n if os.path.exists(self.pid_file):\n try:\n os.remove(self.pid_file)\n logging.info(f\"\u5df2\u5220\u9664PID\u6587\u4ef6: {self.pid_file}\")\n except Exception as e:\n logging.warning(f\"\u5220\u9664PID\u6587\u4ef6\u5931\u8d25: {e}\")\n \n def _setup_daemon_logging(self):\n \"\"\"\u8bbe\u7f6e\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u4e13\u7528\u65e5\u5fd7\"\"\"\n log_level = getattr(logging, self.daemon_config.get('runtime', {}).get('log_level', 'INFO'))\n \n # \u521b\u5efa\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u4e13\u7528\u7684\u65e5\u5fd7\u5904\u7406\u5668\n daemon_handler = logging.FileHandler(self.log_file, encoding='utf-8')\n daemon_formatter = logging.Formatter(\n '%(asctime)s - [DAEMON] - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'\n )\n daemon_handler.setFormatter(daemon_formatter)\n \n # \u83b7\u53d6\u6839\u65e5\u5fd7\u8bb0\u5f55\u5668\u5e76\u6dfb\u52a0\u5904\u7406\u5668\n logger = logging.getLogger()\n logger.addHandler(daemon_handler)\n logger.setLevel(log_level)\n \n def _write_pid_file(self):\n \"\"\"\u5199\u5165PID\u6587\u4ef6\"\"\"\n try:\n with open(self.pid_file, 'w') as f:\n f.write(str(os.getpid()))\n logging.info(f\"PID\u6587\u4ef6\u5df2\u521b\u5efa: {self.pid_file}\")\n except Exception as e:\n logging.error(f\"\u521b\u5efaPID\u6587\u4ef6\u5931\u8d25: {e}\")\n raise\n \n def _read_pid_file(self) -> Optional[int]:\n \"\"\"\u8bfb\u53d6PID\u6587\u4ef6\"\"\"\n if not os.path.exists(self.pid_file):\n return None\n try:\n with open(self.pid_file, 'r') as f:\n return int(f.read().strip())\n except Exception as e:\n logging.warning(f\"\u8bfb\u53d6PID\u6587\u4ef6\u5931\u8d25: {e}\")\n return None\n \n def is_daemon_running(self) -> bool:\n \"\"\"\u68c0\u67e5\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u662f\u5426\u6b63\u5728\u8fd0\u884c\"\"\"\n pid = self._read_pid_file()\n if pid is None:\n return False\n \n if not DAEMON_AVAILABLE or psutil is None:\n # \u5982\u679cpsutil\u4e0d\u53ef\u7528\uff0c\u4f7f\u7528\u7b80\u5355\u7684\u8fdb\u7a0b\u68c0\u67e5\n try:\n os.kill(pid, 0)\n return True\n except OSError:\n return False\n else:\n # \u4f7f\u7528psutil\u8fdb\u884c\u66f4\u51c6\u786e\u7684\u68c0\u67e5\n try:\n process = psutil.Process(pid)\n return process.is_running() and process.status() != psutil.STATUS_ZOMBIE\n except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):\n return False\n \n def _setup_schedule(self):\n \"\"\"\u8bbe\u7f6e\u8c03\u5ea6\u4efb\u52a1\"\"\"\n if not DAEMON_AVAILABLE or schedule is None:\n raise RuntimeError(\"\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\u9700\u8981\u5b89\u88c5 schedule \u5e93: pip install schedule\")\n \n schedule_config = self.daemon_config.get('schedule', {})\n times = schedule_config.get('times', ['09:00'])\n \n # \u6e05\u9664\u73b0\u6709\u7684\u8c03\u5ea6\u4efb\u52a1\n schedule.clear()\n \n # \u8bbe\u7f6e\u5b9a\u65f6\u4efb\u52a1\n for time_str in times:\n try:\n schedule.every().day.at(time_str).do(self._run_scheduled_task)\n logging.info(f\"\u5df2\u8bbe\u7f6e\u5b9a\u65f6\u4efb\u52a1: \u6bcf\u5929 {time_str}\")\n except Exception as e:\n logging.error(f\"\u8bbe\u7f6e\u5b9a\u65f6\u4efb\u52a1\u5931\u8d25 ({time_str}): {e}\")\n \n def _run_scheduled_task(self):\n \"\"\"\u6267\u884c\u8c03\u5ea6\u4efb\u52a1\"\"\"\n logging.info(\"\u5f00\u59cb\u6267\u884c\u5b9a\u65f6\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1...\")\n \n try:\n downloader = HKEXDownloader(self.config_manager)\n tasks_config = self.daemon_config.get('tasks', {})\n \n if tasks_config.get('run_all_enabled', True):\n # \u6267\u884c\u6240\u6709\u542f\u7528\u7684\u4efb\u52a1\n tasks = self.config_manager.get('download_tasks') or []\n enabled_tasks = [t for t in tasks if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('enabled', True)]\n \n if not enabled_tasks:\n logging.warning(\"\u6ca1\u6709\u627e\u5230\u542f\u7528\u7684\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\")\n return\n \n total_downloaded = 0\n for i, task in enumerate(enabled_tasks, 1):\n task_name = task.get('name', f'\u4efb\u52a1{i}')\n logging.info(f\"[{i}/{len(enabled_tasks)}] \u6267\u884c\u4efb\u52a1: {task_name}\")\n \n retry_count = 0\n while retry_count < self.max_retries:\n try:\n save_path, count = downloader.download_announcements(task)\n total_downloaded += count\n logging.info(f\"\u2713 \u4efb\u52a1 '{task_name}' \u5b8c\u6210: \u4e0b\u8f7d {count} \u4e2a\u6587\u4ef6\")\n break\n except Exception as e:\n retry_count += 1\n if retry_count < self.max_retries:\n logging.warning(f\"\u2717 \u4efb\u52a1 '{task_name}' \u5931\u8d25 (\u7b2c{retry_count}\u6b21\u91cd\u8bd5): {e}\")\n time.sleep(self.retry_delay)\n else:\n logging.error(f\"\u2717 \u4efb\u52a1 '{task_name}' \u6700\u7ec8\u5931\u8d25: {e}\")\n \n logging.info(f\"\u5b9a\u65f6\u4efb\u52a1\u6267\u884c\u5b8c\u6210\uff01\u603b\u5171\u4e0b\u8f7d {total_downloaded} \u4e2a\u6587\u4ef6\")\n \n else:\n # \u68c0\u67e5\u8c03\u5ea6\u914d\u7f6e\n schedule_config = config.get('schedule', {})\n times = schedule_config.get('times', [])\n if times:\n print(f\"\u2713 \u8c03\u5ea6\u65f6\u95f4: {', '.join(times)}\")\n else:\n print(\"\u26a0 \u672a\u914d\u7f6e\u8c03\u5ea6\u65f6\u95f4\")\n \n # \u68c0\u67e5\u4efb\u52a1\u914d\u7f6e\n tasks = self.config_manager.get('download_tasks') or []\n enabled_tasks = [t for t in tasks if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('enabled', True)]\n print(f\"\u2713 \u53ef\u6267\u884c\u4efb\u52a1: {len(enabled_tasks)} \u4e2a\")\n \n # IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "daemon_control.py", "file_content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nHKEX \u516c\u544a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u5668 - \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u63a7\u5236\u811a\u672c\n\u4f5c\u8005\uff1aVictor Suen\n\u7248\u672c\uff1a2.1\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nimport argparse\nfrom main import HKEXDownloaderCLI\n\ndef main():\n \"\"\"\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u63a7\u5236\u811a\u672c\u4e3b\u51fd\u6570\"\"\"\n parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n description='HKEX \u516c\u544a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u5668 - \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u63a7\u5236',\n formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,\n epilog=\"\"\"\n\u4f7f\u7528\u793a\u4f8b:\n %(prog)s start # \u542f\u52a8\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\n %(prog)s stop # \u505c\u6b62\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\n %(prog)s restart # \u91cd\u542f\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\n %(prog)s status # \u67e5\u770b\u72b6\u6001\n %(prog)s test # \u6d4b\u8bd5\u914d\u7f6e\n \"\"\")\n \n parser.add_argument('action', \n choices=['start', 'stop', 'restart', 'status', 'test'],\n help='\u8981\u6267\u884c\u7684\u64cd\u4f5c')\n \n parser.add_argument('-c', '--config',\n default='config.yaml',\n help='\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84 (\u9ed8\u8ba4: config.yaml)')\n \n args = parser.parse_args()\n \n # \u6784\u5efa\u5bf9\u5e94\u7684main.py\u53c2\u6570\n main_args = [\n '--config', args.config,\n f'--daemon-{args.action}'\n ]\n \n # \u4e34\u65f6\u4fee\u6539sys.argv\u6765\u8c03\u7528main.py\n original_argv = sys.argv[:]\n try:\n sys.argv = ['main.py'] + main_args\n cli = HKEXDownloaderCLI()\n cli.main()\n finally:\n sys.argv = original_argv\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n main()"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":2,"type":0,"content":"现在让我创建一个简单的启动脚本来方便使用守护者进程模式：

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "DAEMON_README.md", "file_content": "# HKEX \u516c\u544a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u5668 - \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\n\n## \u6982\u8ff0\n\n\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\u5141\u8bb8HKEX\u516c\u544a\u4e0b\u8f7d\u5668\u5728\u540e\u53f0\u81ea\u52a8\u8fd0\u884c\uff0c\u6309\u7167\u9884\u8bbe\u7684\u65f6\u95f4\u8868\u5b9a\u671f\u4e0b\u8f7d\u516c\u544a\uff0c\u65e0\u9700\u624b\u52a8\u5e72\u9884\u3002\n\n## \u529f\u80fd\u7279\u6027\n\n- \u2705 **\u5b9a\u65f6\u8c03\u5ea6**: \u652f\u6301\u6bcf\u5929\u591a\u4e2a\u65f6\u95f4\u70b9\u81ea\u52a8\u6267\u884c\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\n- \u2705 **\u540e\u53f0\u8fd0\u884c**: \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u5728\u540e\u53f0\u6301\u7eed\u8fd0\u884c\uff0c\u4e0d\u5f71\u54cd\u5176\u4ed6\u5de5\u4f5c\n- \u2705 **\u8fdb\u7a0b\u7ba1\u7406**: \u652f\u6301\u542f\u52a8\u3001\u505c\u6b62\u3001\u91cd\u542f\u3001\u72b6\u6001\u67e5\u770b\u7b49\u64cd\u4f5c\n- \u2705 **\u9519\u8bef\u6062\u590d**: \u81ea\u52a8\u91cd\u8bd5\u5931\u8d25\u7684\u4efb\u52a1\uff0c\u63d0\u9ad8\u7a33\u5b9a\u6027\n- \u2705 **\u65e5\u5fd7\u8bb0\u5f55**: \u8be6\u7ec6\u7684\u8fd0\u884c\u65e5\u5fd7\uff0c\u4fbf\u4e8e\u76d1\u63a7\u548c\u8c03\u8bd5\n- \u2705 **\u914d\u7f6e\u7075\u6d3b**: \u901a\u8fc7\u914d\u7f6e\u6587\u4ef6\u7075\u6d3b\u8bbe\u7f6e\u8c03\u5ea6\u65f6\u95f4\u548c\u4efb\u52a1\u53c2\u6570\n\n## \u5b89\u88c5\u4f9d\u8d56\n\n\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\u9700\u8981\u989d\u5916\u7684Python\u5305\uff1a\n\n```bash\npip install schedule psutil\n```\n\n\u6216\u8005\u5b89\u88c5\u5b8c\u6574\u7684\u4f9d\u8d56\uff1a\n\n```bash\npip install -r requirements.txt\n```\n\n## \u914d\u7f6e\u8bbe\u7f6e\n\n\u5728 `config.yaml` \u6587\u4ef6\u4e2d\u914d\u7f6e\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\uff1a\n\n```yaml\n# \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u914d\u7f6e\ndaemon:\n enabled: true # \u542f\u7528\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\n schedule:\n times: [\"09:00\", \"18:00\"] # \u6bcf\u5929\u6267\u884c\u65f6\u95f4 (24\u5c0f\u65f6\u5236)\n \n runtime:\n check_interval: 60 # \u68c0\u67e5\u8c03\u5ea6\u95f4\u9694 (\u79d2)\n max_retries: 3 # \u4efb\u52a1\u5931\u8d25\u6700\u5927\u91cd\u8bd5\u6b21\u6570\n retry_delay: 300 # \u91cd\u8bd5\u95f4\u9694 (\u79d2)\n \n process:\n pid_file: \"hkex_daemon.pid\" # PID\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84\n log_file: \"hkex_daemon.log\" # \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u65e5\u5fd7\u6587\u4ef6\n \n tasks:\n run_all_enabled: true # \u6267\u884c\u6240\u6709\u542f\u7528\u7684\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\n run_on_startup: false # \u662f\u5426\u5728\u542f\u52a8\u65f6\u7acb\u5373\u6267\u884c\u4e00\u6b21\n```\n\n## \u4f7f\u7528\u65b9\u6cd5\n\n### 1. \u547d\u4ee4\u884c\u65b9\u5f0f\n\n```bash\n# \u6d4b\u8bd5\u914d\u7f6e\npython main.py --daemon-test\n\n# \u542f\u52a8\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\npython main.py --daemon-start\n\n# \u67e5\u770b\u72b6\u6001\npython main.py --daemon-status\n\n# \u505c\u6b62\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\npython main.py --daemon-stop\n\n# \u91cd\u542f\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\npython main.py --daemon-restart\n```\n\n### 2. \u4fbf\u6377\u811a\u672c\u65b9\u5f0f\n\n#### Windows\u7528\u6237\uff1a\n\n```cmd\n# \u542f\u52a8\ndaemon.bat start\n\n# \u67e5\u770b\u72b6\u6001\ndaemon.bat status\n\n# \u505c\u6b62\ndaemon.bat stop\n\n# \u91cd\u542f\ndaemon.bat restart\n\n# \u6d4b\u8bd5\u914d\u7f6e\ndaemon.bat test\n```\n\n#### Linux/macOS\u7528\u6237\uff1a\n\n```bash\n# \u542f\u52a8\n./daemon.sh start\n\n# \u67e5\u770b\u72b6\u6001\n./daemon.sh status\n\n# \u505c\u6b62\n./daemon.sh stop\n\n# \u91cd\u542f\n./daemon.sh restart\n\n# \u6d4b\u8bd5\u914d\u7f6e\n./daemon.sh test\n```\n\n### 3. Python\u811a\u672c\u65b9\u5f0f\n\n```bash\n# \u4f7f\u7528\u4e13\u7528\u7684\u63a7\u5236\u811a\u672c\npython daemon_control.py start\npython daemon_control.py status\npython daemon_control.py stop\n```\n\n## \u8fd0\u884c\u6d41\u7a0b\n\n1. **\u542f\u52a8**: \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u542f\u52a8\u540e\u4f1a\u521b\u5efaPID\u6587\u4ef6\uff0c\u8bbe\u7f6e\u8c03\u5ea6\u4efb\u52a1\n2. **\u8c03\u5ea6**: \u6309\u7167\u914d\u7f6e\u7684\u65f6\u95f4\u70b9\u81ea\u52a8\u6267\u884c\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\n3. **\u6267\u884c**: \u8fd0\u884c\u6240\u6709\u542f\u7528\u7684\u4e0b\u8f7d\u4efb\u52a1\uff0c\u652f\u6301\u5931\u8d25\u91cd\u8bd5\n4. **\u65e5\u5fd7**: \u8bb0\u5f55\u8be6\u7ec6\u7684\u8fd0\u884c\u65e5\u5fd7\u5230\u6307\u5b9a\u6587\u4ef6\n5. **\u76d1\u63a7**: \u53ef\u968f\u65f6\u67e5\u770b\u8fdb\u7a0b\u72b6\u6001\u548c\u8fd0\u884c\u60c5\u51b5\n\n## \u65e5\u5fd7\u6587\u4ef6\n\n- **\u4e3b\u65e5\u5fd7**: `hkex_downloader.log` - \u5305\u542b\u6240\u6709\u64cd\u4f5c\u7684\u65e5\u5fd7\n- **\u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u65e5\u5fd7**: `hkex_daemon.log` - \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u4e13\u7528\u65e5\u5fd7\n\n## \u6545\u969c\u6392\u9664\n\n### \u5e38\u89c1\u95ee\u9898\n\n1. **\u4f9d\u8d56\u5305\u672a\u5b89\u88c5**\n ```\n \u9519\u8bef: \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\u9700\u8981\u5b89\u88c5\u989d\u5916\u4f9d\u8d56\n \u89e3\u51b3: pip install schedule psutil\n ```\n\n2. **\u914d\u7f6e\u672a\u542f\u7528**\n ```\n \u9519\u8bef: \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6a21\u5f0f\u672a\u542f\u7528\n \u89e3\u51b3: \u5728config.yaml\u4e2d\u8bbe\u7f6e daemon.enabled: true\n ```\n\n3. **\u6743\u9650\u95ee\u9898**\n ```\n \u9519\u8bef: PID\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84\u4e0d\u53ef\u5199\n \u89e3\u51b3: \u68c0\u67e5\u6587\u4ef6\u8def\u5f84\u6743\u9650\u6216\u66f4\u6539\u4e3a\u53ef\u5199\u76ee\u5f55\n ```\n\n4. **\u8fdb\u7a0b\u5df2\u8fd0\u884c**\n ```\n \u9519\u8bef: \u5b88\u62a4\u8005\u8fdb\u7a0b\u5df2\u5728\u8fd0\u884c\n \u89e3\u51b3: \u5148\u505c\u6b62\u73b0\u6709\u8fdb\u7a0b\u6216\u4f7f\u7528restart\u547d\u4ee4\n ```\n\n### \u8c03\u8bd5\u65b9\u6cd5\n\n1. **\u6d4b\u8bd5\u914d\u7f6e**: `python main.py --daemon-test`\n2. **\u67e5\u770b\u65e5\u5fd7**: \u68c0\u67e5 `hkex_daemon.log` \u6587\u4ef6\n3. **\u68c0\u67e5\u72b6\u6001**: `python main.py --daemon-status`\n\n## \u6700\u4f73\u5b9e\u8df5\n\n1.
