 518	class HKEXDownloader:
 519	 """HKEX公告下载器核心类"""
 520	
 521	 def __init__(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):
 522	 self.config = config_manager
 523	 self.headers = {"User-Agent": self.config.get('advanced', 'user_agent')}
 524	 self.session = requests.Session()
 525	 self.session.headers.update(self.headers)
 526	
 527	 # 设置超时和重试
 528	 self.timeout = self.config.get('advanced', 'timeout', 30)
 529	 self.retry_attempts = self.config.get('advanced', 'retry_attempts', 3)
 530	 self.request_delay = self.config.get('advanced', 'request_delay', 1)
 531	
 532	 # 初始化公告分类器
 533	 self.classifier = AnnouncementClassifier(self.config.config)
 534	
 535	 def get_stockid(self, stockcode: str) -> str:
 536	 """根据股票代码获取股票ID"""
 537	 for attempt in range(self.retry_attempts):
 538	 try:
 539	 url = f'https://www1.hkexnews.hk/search/prefix.do?&callback=callback&lang=ZH&type=A&name={stockcode}&market=SEHK&_=1653821865437'
 540	 response = self.session.get(url, timeout=self.timeout)
 541	
 542	 # 处理 JSONP 响应
 543	 data = response.text[9:-4]
 544	 data_json = json.loads(data)
 545	
 546	 if 'stockInfo' not in data_json or not data_json['stockInfo']:
 547	 raise ValueError(f"未找到股票代码 {stockcode} 对应的信息")
 548	
 549	 stockid = data_json["stockInfo"][0]['stockId']
 550	 logging.info(f"股票代码 {stockcode} 对应的 StockID: {stockid}")
 551	 return stockid
 552	
 553	 except Exception as e:
 554	 if attempt < self.retry_attempts - 1:
 555	 logging.warning(f"获取股票信息失败，第 {attempt + 1} 次重试: {e}")
 556	 time.sleep(self.request_delay)
 557	 continue
 558	 else:
 559	 raise Exception(f"获取股票 {stockcode} 信息失败: {str(e)}")
 560	
 561	 def get_announcement_list(self, stockcode: str, start_date: datetime, end_date: datetime,
 562	 keywords: List[str] = None) -> List[Dict]:
 563	 """获取公告列表"""
 564	 try:
 565	 # 获取 stockId
 566	 stockid = self.get_stockid(stockcode)
 567	
 568	 # 处理关键字
 569	 search_keyword = keywords[-1] if keywords else ""
 570	
 571	 # 准备日期格式
 572	 start_date_str = start_date.strftime("%Y%m%d")
 573	 end_date_str = end_date.strftime("%Y%m%d")
 574	
 575	 # 获取语言和最大结果数设置
 576	 language = self.config.get('settings', 'language', 'zh')
 577	 max_results = self.config.get('settings', 'max_results', 500)
 578	
 579	 # 构建完整URL
 580	 url = f'https://www1.hkexnews.hk/search/titleSearchServlet.do?sortDir=0&sortByOptions=DateTime&category=0&market=SEHK&stockId={stockid}&documentType=-1&fromDate={start_date_str}&toDate={end_date_str}&title={search_keyword}&searchType=0&t1code=-2&t2Gcode=-2&t2code=-2&rowRange={max_results}&lang={language}'
 581	
 582	 logging.info(f"搜索URL: {url}")
 583	
 584	 headers = {"sec-ch-ua-platform": "\"Windows\"", "x-requested-with": "XMLHttpRequest",
 585	 "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/138.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
 586	 "accept": "text/html, */*; q=0.01",
 587	 "sec-ch-ua": "\"Not)A;Brand\";v=\"8\", \"Chromium\";v=\"138\", \"Google Chrome\";v=\"138\"",
 588	 "sec-ch-ua-mobile": "?0", "sec-fetch-site": "same-origin", "sec-fetch-mode": "cors",
 589	 "sec-fetch-dest": "empty", "referer": "https://www1.hkexnews.hk/search/titlesearch.xhtml?lang=zh",
 590	 "accept-encoding": "gzip, deflate, br, zstd", "accept-language": "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9",
 591	 # "cookie": "TS38b16b21027=086f2721efab2000642dbe64e6deea82232cbbc6623ec72c04dbb365e5fabaffc676ede33e5ea917086e538f3c113000ddf73ed4c79657e7aa42a671f5d22a7baf96133d9aa7f533998a6e8a9ff9aa432321b18be489d59c7c54e761b51a3c42",
 592	 "priority": "u=0, i"}
 593	
 594	 # 发送请求
 595	 response = self.session.get(url, timeout=self.timeout, headers=headers)
 596	
 597	 # 处理返回头的 set-cookie
 598	 if 'set-cookie' in response.headers:
 599	 self.session.headers.update({'cookie': response.headers['set-cookie']})
 600	 if response.status_code != 200:
 601	 raise Exception(f"无法连接到港交所网站 (状态码: {response.status_code})")
 602	
 603	 # 处理响应数据
 604	 try:
 605	 data = response.text
 606	 # 清理响应文本
 607	 data = data.replace('"[{', '[{').replace('}]"', '}]').replace('\\', "").replace('u2013', "-").replace(
 608	 'u0026', "-")
 609	 data_json = json.loads(data)
 610	
 611	 if not data_json or 'result' not in data_json or not data_json['result']:
 612	 logging.warning("未找到符合条件的公告")
 613	 return []
 614	
 615	 announcements = []
 616	 for item in data_json['result']:
 617	 try:
 618	 # 获取标题
 619	 title = item['TITLE'].replace('/', "-")
 620	
 621	 # 获取 PDF 链接
 622	 pdflink = item['FILE_LINK']
 623	 pdf_link = "https://www1.hkexnews.hk" + pdflink
 624	
 625	 # 处理日期
 626	 anndate = item['DATE_TIME']
 627	 anndate = anndate[:10].replace('/', "-")
 628	 date_object = datetime.strptime(anndate, "%d-%m-%Y")
 629	 formatted_date = date_object.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
 630	
 631	 announcements.append({'date': formatted_date, 'title': title, 'link': pdf_link})
 632	
 633	 except Exception as e:
 634	 logging.warning(f"处理公告项目时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 635	 continue
 636	
 637	 logging.info(f"找到 {len(announcements)} 个符合条件的公告")
 638	 return announcements
 639	
 640	 except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
 641	 logging.error(f"JSON 解析错误: {str(e)}")
 642	 raise Exception("服务器响应格式无效")
 643	
 644	 except Exception as e:
 645	 raise Exception(f"获取公告列表时发生错误: {str(e)}")
 646	
 647	 def download_announcements(self, task: Dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, int]:
 648	 """下载公告文件"""
 649	 try:
 650	 # 检查是否从数据库获取股票
 651	 if task.get('from_database', False):
 652	 return self._download_from_database(task)
 653	
 654	 # 解析任务参数
 655	 stockcode = task.get('stock_code')
 656	 if not stockcode:
 657	 raise ValueError("任务配置缺少 stock_code")
 658	
 659	 return self._download_single_stock(task, stockcode)
 660	
 661	 except Exception as e:
 662	 raise Exception(f"下载过程中出现错误: {str(e)}")
 663	
 664	 def _download_from_database(self, task: Dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, int]:
 665	 """从数据库获取股票列表并下载"""
 666	 query = task.get('query')
 667	
 668	 # 获取数据库任务配置
 669	 db_task_config = task.get('database_config', {})
 670	 batch_size = db_task_config.get('batch_size', 50)
 671	 delay_between_batches = db_task_config.get('delay_between_batches', 5)
 672	 skip_on_error = db_task_config.get('skip_on_error', True)
 673	
 674	 # 从守护者进程配置获取数据库任务设置
 675	 daemon_config = getattr(self.config, 'config', {}).get('daemon', {})
 676	 db_tasks_config = daemon_config.get('tasks', {}).get('database_tasks', {})
 677	 refresh_connection = db_tasks_config.get('refresh_connection', True)
 678	 show_progress = db_tasks_config.get('show_progress', True)
 679	
 680	 # 刷新数据库连接（如果配置了）
 681	 if refresh_connection:
 682	 logging.info("刷新数据库连接...")
 683	
 684	 stock_codes = self.config.get_stocks_from_database(query)
 685	
 686	 if not stock_codes:
 687	 logging.warning("从数据库未获取到任何股票代码")
 688	 return "", 0
 689	
 690	 logging.info(f"从数据库获取到 {len(stock_codes)} 个活跃股票代码")
 691	 if show_progress:
 692	 logging.info(f"股票列表预览: {', '.join(stock_codes[:10])}{'...' if len(stock_codes) > 10 else ''}")
 693	
 694	 total_downloaded = 0
 695	 success_count = 0
 696	 error_count = 0
 697	 base_save_path = self.config.get('settings', 'save_path')
 698	
 699	 # 分批处理股票
 700	 for batch_start in range(0, len(stock_codes), batch_size):
 701	 batch_end = min(batch_start + batch_size, len(stock_codes))
 702	 batch_codes = stock_codes[batch_start:batch_end]
 703	 batch_num = (batch_start // batch_size) + 1
 704	 total_batches = (len(stock_codes) + batch_size - 1) // batch_size
 705	
 706	 logging.info(f"开始处理第 {batch_num}/{total_batches} 批股票 ({len(batch_codes)} 个)")
 707	
 708	 for i, stock_code in enumerate(batch_codes, 1):
 709	 global_index = batch_start + i
 710	 try:
 711	 if show_progress:
 712	 logging.info(f"[{global_index}/{len(stock_codes)}] 处理股票: {stock_code}")
 713	
 714	 # 创建临时任务配置
 715	 stock_task = task.copy()
 716	 stock_task['stock_code'] = stock_code
 717	 stock_task.pop('from_database', None)
 718	 stock_task.pop('query', None)
 719	 stock_task.pop('database_config', None)
 720	
 721	 save_path, count = self._download_single_stock(stock_task, stock_code)
 722	 total_downloaded += count
 723	 success_count += 1
 724	
 725	 if count > 0:
 726	 logging.info(f"✓ 股票 {stock_code} 下载完成: {count} 个文件")
 727	 else:
 728	 logging.debug(f"- 股票 {stock_code} 无新文件")
 729	
 730	 except Exception as e:
 731	 error_count += 1
 732	 if skip_on_error:
 733	 logging.warning(f"✗ 股票 {stock_code} 下载失败，跳过: {str(e)}")
 734	 continue
 735	 else:
 736	 logging.error(f"✗ 股票 {stock_code} 下载失败: {str(e)}")
 737	 raise
 738	
 739	 # 批次间延迟
 740	 if batch_num < total_batches and delay_between_batches > 0:
 741	 logging.info(f"批次 {batch_num} 完成，等待 {delay_between_batches} 秒后继续...")
 742	 time.sleep(delay_between_batches)
 743	
 744	 # 输出统计信息
 745	 logging.info(f"数据库任务完成！")
 746	 logging.info(f" 总股票数: {len(stock_codes)}")
 747	 logging.info(f" 成功处理: {success_count}")
 748	 logging.info(f" 失败数量: {error_count}")
 749	 logging.info(f" 下载文件: {total_downloaded} 个")
 750	
 751	 return os.path.join(base_save_path, 'HKEX'), total_downloaded
 752	
 753	 def _download_single_stock(self, task: Dict[str, Any], stockcode: str) -> tuple[str, int]:
 754	 """下载单个股票的公告"""
 755	 # 解析日期
 756	 start_date = self.config.parse_date(task.get('start_date', '2024-01-01'))
 757	 end_date = self.config.parse_date(task.get('end_date', 'today'))
 758	
 759	 keywords = task.get('keywords', [])
 760	
 761	 logging.info(f"开始下载任务: {task.get('name', '未命名任务')}")
 762	 logging.info(
 763	 f"股票代码: {stockcode}, 日期范围: {start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')} 至 {end_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}")
 764	
 765	 # 获取公告列表
 766	 announcements = self.get_announcement_list(stockcode, start_date, end_date, keywords)
 767	
 768	 if not announcements:
 769	 logging.warning("未找到符合条件的公告")
 770	 return "", 0
 771	
 772	 # 创建保存目录
 773	 save_path = self.config.get('settings', 'save_path')
 774	 base_path = os.path.join(save_path, 'HKEX', stockcode)
 775	
 776	 if not os.path.exists(base_path):
 777	 os.makedirs(base_path)
 778	 logging.info(f"创建保存目录: {base_path}")
 779	
 780	 # 获取分类统计
 781	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 782	 classification_stats = self.classifier.get_classification_stats(announcements)
 783	 logging.info(f"公告分类统计: {classification_stats}")
 784	
 785	 # 下载公告
 786	 download_count = 0
 787	 filename_length = self.config.get('settings', 'filename_length', 220)
 788	 overwrite = self.config.get('advanced', 'overwrite_existing', False)
 789	
 790	 total_count = len(announcements)
 791	
 792	 for i, ann in enumerate(announcements, 1):
 793	 try:
 794	 # 使用分类器确定文件保存路径
 795	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 796	 main_category, sub_category = self.classifier.classify_announcement(ann['title'])
 797	 category_path = self.classifier.get_folder_path(main_category, sub_category)
 798	 savepath = os.path.join(base_path, category_path)
 799	 else:
 800	 savepath = base_path
 801	
 802	 # 确保分类文件夹存在
 803	 if not os.path.exists(savepath):
 804	 os.makedirs(savepath)
 805	 logging.info(f"创建分类目录: {savepath}")
 806	
 807	 filepath = os.path.join(savepath, f"{ann['date']}_{stockcode}-{ann['title'][:filename_length]}.pdf")
 808	
 809	 # 检查文件是否已存在
 810	 if os.path.exists(filepath) and not overwrite:
 811	 logging.info(f"跳过已存在的文件 ({i}/{total_count}): {os.path.basename(filepath)}")
 812	 continue
 813	
 814	 # 显示分类信息
 815	 if self.classifier.enabled:
 816	 logging.info(f"正在下载 ({i}/{total_count}) [{main_category}/{sub_category}]: {ann['title']}")
 817	 else:
 818	 logging.info(f"正在下载 ({i}/{total_count}): {ann['title']}")
 819	
 820	 response = self.session.get(ann['link'], timeout=self.timeout)
 821	 if response.status_code == 200:
 822	 with open(filepath, 'wb') as f:
 823	 f.write(response.content)
 824	 download_count += 1
 825	 logging.info(f"✓ 成功下载: {os.path.basename(filepath)}")
 826	 else:
 827	 logging.warning(f"下载失败 (HTTP {response.status_code}): {ann['title']}")
 828	
 829	 # 请求间隔
 830	 if self.request_delay > 0:
 831	 time.sleep(self.request_delay)
 832	
 833	 except Exception as e:
 834	 logging.error(f"下载文件时发生错误: {ann['title']} - {str(e)}")
 835	 continue
 836	
 837	 logging.info(f"任务完成！成功下载 {download_count}/{total_count} 个文件到 {base_path}")
 838	 return base_path, download_count
 839	
 840	
 841	class DaemonManager:
 842	 """守护者进程管理器"""
 843	
 844	 def __init__(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):
 845	 self.config_manager = config_manager
 846	 self.daemon_config = config_manager.get('daemon') or {}
 847	 self.is_running = False
 848	 self.should_stop = False
 849	 self.pid_file = self.daemon_config.get('process', {}).get('pid_file', 'hkex_daemon.pid')
 850	 self.log_file = self.daemon_config.get('process', {}).get('log_file', 'hkex_daemon.log')
 851	 self.check_interval = self.daemon_config.get('runtime', {}).get('check_interval', 60)
 852	 self.max_retries = self.daemon_config.get('runtime', {}).get('max_retries', 3)
 853	 self.retry_delay = self.daemon_config.get('runtime', {}).get('retry_delay', 300)
 854	
 855	 # 设置信号处理
 856	 signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, self._signal_handler)
 857	 signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, self._signal_handler)
 858	
 859	 # 注册退出处理
 860	 atexit.register(self._cleanup)
 861	
 862	 def _signal_handler(self, signum, frame):
 863	 """信号处理器"""
 864	 logging.info(f"收到信号 {signum}，准备停止守护者进程...")
 865	 self.should_stop = True
 866	
 867	 def _cleanup(self):
 868	 """清理资源"""
 869	 if os.path.exists(self.pid_file):
 870	 try:
 871	 os.remove(self.pid_file)
 872	 logging.info(f"已删除PID文件: {self.pid_file}")
 873	 except Exception as e:
 874	 logging.warning(f"删除PID文件失败: {e}")
 875	
 876	 def _setup_daemon_logging(self):
 877	 """设置守护者进程专用日志"""
 878	 log_level = getattr(logging, self.daemon_config.get('runtime', {}).get('log_level', 'INFO'))
 879	
 880	 # 创建守护者进程专用的日志处理器
 881	 daemon_handler = logging.FileHandler(self.log_file, encoding='utf-8')
 882	 daemon_formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - [DAEMON] - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
 883	 daemon_handler.setFormatter(daemon_formatter)
 884	
 885	 # 获取根日志记录器并添加处理器
 886	 logger = logging.getLogger()
 887	 logger.addHandler(daemon_handler)
 888	 logger.setLevel(log_level)
 889	
 890	 def _write_pid_file(self):
 891	 """写入PID文件"""
 892	 try:
 893	 with open(self.pid_file, 'w') as f:
 894	 f.write(str(os.getpid()))
 895	 logging.info(f"PID文件已创建: {self.pid_file}")
 896	 except Exception as e:
 897	 logging.error(f"创建PID文件失败: {e}")
 898	 raise
 899	
 900	 def _read_pid_file(self) -> Optional[int]:
 901	 """读取PID文件"""
 902	 if not os.path.exists(self.pid_file):
 903	 return None
 904	 try:
 905	 with open(self.pid_file, 'r') as f:
 906	 return int(f.read().strip())
 907	 except Exception as e:
 908	 logging.warning(f"读取PID文件失败: {e}")
 909	 return None
 910	
 911	 def is_daemon_running(self) -> bool:
 912	 """检查守护者进程是否正在运行"""
 913	 pid = self._read_pid_file()
 914	 if pid is None:
 915	 return False
 916	
 917	 if not DAEMON_AVAILABLE or psutil is None:
 918	 # 如果psutil不可用，使用简单的进程检查
 919	 try:
 920	 os.kill(pid, 0)
 921	 return True
 922	 except OSError:
 923	 return False
 924	 else:
 925	 # 使用psutil进行更准确的检查
 926	 try:
 927	 process = psutil.Process(pid)
 928	 return process.is_running() and process.status() != psutil.STATUS_ZOMBIE
 929	 except (psutil.NoSuchProcess, psutil.AccessDenied):
 930	 return False
 931	
 932	 def _setup_schedule(self):
 933	 """设置调度任务"""
 934	 if not DAEMON_AVAILABLE or schedule is None:
 935	 raise RuntimeError("守护者进程模式需要安装 schedule 库: pip install schedule")
 936	
 937	 schedule_config = self.daemon_config.get('schedule', {})
 938	 times = schedule_config.get('times', ['09:00'])
 939	
 940	 # 清除现有的调度任务
 941	 schedule.clear()
 942	
 943	 # 设置定时任务
 944	 for time_str in times:
 945	 try:
 946	 schedule.every().day.at(time_str).do(self._run_scheduled_task)
 947	 logging.info(f"已设置定时任务: 每天 {time_str}")
 948	 except Exception as e:
 949	 logging.error(f"设置定时任务失败 ({time_str}): {e}")
 950	
 951	 def _run_scheduled_task(self):
 952	 """执行调度任务"""
 953	 logging.info("开始执行定时下载任务...")
 954	
 955	 try:
 956	 downloader = HKEXDownloader(self.config_manager)
 957	 tasks_config = self.daemon_config.get('tasks', {})
 958	
 959	 if tasks_config.get('run_all_enabled', True):
 960	 # 执行所有启用的任务
 961	 tasks = self.config_manager.get('download_tasks') or []
 962	 enabled_tasks = [t for t in tasks if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('enabled', True)]
 963	
 964	 if not enabled_tasks:
 965	 logging.warning("没有找到启用的下载任务")
 966	 return
 967	
 968	 # 检查是否启用增量下载模式
 969	 incremental_mode = tasks_config.get('incremental_mode', False)
 970	 incremental_days = tasks_config.get('incremental_days', 7)
 971	
 972	 if incremental_mode:
 973	 logging.info(f"启用增量下载模式，获取最近 {incremental_days} 天的公告")
 974	 # 计算增量下载的日期范围
 975	 end_date = datetime.now()
 976	 start_date = end_date - timedelta(days=incremental_days)
 977	
 978	 # 为每个任务设置增量日期范围
 979	 for task in enabled_tasks:
 980	 task = task.copy() # 创建副本避免修改原配置
 981	 task['start_date'] = start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
 982	 task['end_date'] = 'today'
 983	 task['_incremental'] = True # 标记为增量任务
 984	 else:
 985	 logging.info("使用配置文件中的日期范围")
 986	
 987	 total_downloaded = 0
 988	 for i, task in enumerate(enabled_tasks, 1):
 989	 task_name = task.get('name', f'任务{i}')
 990	 is_database_task = task.get('from_database', False)
 991	
 992	 # 如果是增量模式且不是数据库任务，修改任务的日期范围
 993	 if incremental_mode and not is_database_task:
 994	 task = task.copy()
 995	 task['start_date'] = start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
 996	 task['end_date'] = 'today'
 997	 logging.info(f"[{i}/{len(enabled_tasks)}] 执行增量任务: {task_name} (最近{incremental_days}天)")
 998	 elif incremental_mode and is_database_task:
 999	 # 数据库任务也支持增量模式
 1000	 task = task.copy()
 1001	 task['start_date'] = start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
 1002	 task['end_date'] = 'today'
 1003	 logging.info(
 1004	 f"[{i}/{len(enabled_tasks)}] 执行数据库增量任务: {task_name} (最近{incremental_days}天)")
 1005	 else:
 1006	 if is_database_task:
 1007	 logging.info(f"[{i}/{len(enabled_tasks)}] 执行数据库任务: {task_name}")
 1008	 else:
 1009	 logging.info(f"[{i}/{len(enabled_tasks)}] 执行任务: {task_name}")
 1010	
 1011	 retry_count = 0
 1012	 while retry_count < self.max_retries:
 1013	 try:
 1014	 save_path, count = downloader.download_announcements(task)
 1015	 total_downloaded += count
 1016	
 1017	 if is_database_task:
 1018	 logging.info(f"✓ 数据库任务 '{task_name}' 完成: 下载 {count} 个文件")
 1019	 else:
 1020	 logging.info(f"✓ 任务 '{task_name}' 完成: 下载 {count} 个文件")
 1021	 break
 1022	 except Exception as e:
 1023	 retry_count += 1
 1024	 if retry_count < self.max_retries:
 1025	 logging.warning(f"✗ 任务 '{task_name}' 失败 (第{retry_count}次重试): {e}")
 1026	 time.sleep(self.retry_delay)
 1027	 else:
 1028	 logging.error(f"✗ 任务 '{task_name}' 最终失败: {e}")
 1029	
 1030	 if incremental_mode:
 1031	 logging.info(f"增量下载任务执行完成！总共下载 {total_downloaded} 个文件 (最近{incremental_days}天)")
 1032	 else:
 1033	 logging.info(f"定时任务执行完成！总共下载 {total_downloaded} 个文件")
 1034	
 1035	 else:
 1036	 # 执行指定的任务
 1037	 specific_tasks = tasks_config.get('specific_tasks', [])
 1038	 if not specific_tasks:
 1039	 logging.warning("未指定要执行的任务")
 1040	 return
 1041	
 1042	 # 这里可以添加执行特定任务的逻辑
 1043	 logging.info(f"执行指定任务: {specific_tasks}")
 1044	
 1045	 except Exception as e:

 1048	 def start_daemon(self):
 1049	 """启动守护者进程"""
 1050	 if not self.daemon_config.get('enabled', False):
 1051	 raise RuntimeError("守护者进程模式未启用，请在配置文件中设置 daemon.enabled: true")
 1052	
 1053	 if self.is_daemon_running():
 1054	 raise RuntimeError(f"守护者进程已在运行 (PID: {self._read_pid_file()})")
 1055	
 1056	 logging.info("启动守护者进程...")
 1057	
 1058	 # 设置守护者进程日志
 1059	 self._setup_daemon_logging()
 1060	
 1061	 # 写入PID文件
 1062	 self._write_pid_file()
 1063	
 1064	 # 设置调度任务
 1065	 self._setup_schedule()
 1066	
 1067	 # 检查是否在启动时立即执行
 1068	 if self.daemon_config.get('tasks', {}).get('run_on_startup', False):
 1069	 logging.info("启动时立即执行一次任务...")
 1070	 self._run_scheduled_task()
 1071	
 1072	 self.is_running = True
 1073	 logging.info(f"守护者进程已启动 (PID: {os.getpid()})")
 1074	
 1075	 # 主循环
 1076	 try:
 1077	 while not self.should_stop:
 1078	 schedule.run_pending()
 1079	 time.sleep(self.check_interval)
 1080	
 1081	 except KeyboardInterrupt:
 1082	 logging.info("收到中断信号，停止守护者进程...")
 1083	 finally:
 1084	 self.is_running = False
 1085	 self._cleanup()
 1086	 logging.info("守护者进程已停止")
 1087	
 1088	 def stop_daemon(self):
 1089	 """停止守护者进程"""
 1090	 pid = self._read_pid_file()
 1091	 if pid is None:
 1092	 print("守护者进程未运行")
 1093	 return False
 1094	
 1095	 if not self.is_daemon_running():
 1096	 print("守护者进程未运行")
 1097	 # 清理可能存在的无效PID文件
 1098	 if os.path.exists(self.pid_file):
 1099	 os.remove(self.pid_file)
 1100	 return False
 1101	
 1102	 try:
 1103	 print(f"正在停止守护者进程 (PID: {pid})...")
 1104	 os.kill(pid, signal.SIGTERM)
 1105	
 1106	 # 等待进程停止
 1107	 for _ in range(10): # 最多等待10秒
 1108	 if not self.is_daemon_running():
 1109	 print("守护者进程已停止")
 1110	 return True
 1111	 time.sleep(1)
 1112	
 1113	 # 如果进程仍在运行，强制终止
 1114	 print("强制终止守护者进程...")
 1115	 os.kill(pid, signal.SIGKILL)
 1116	 time.sleep(1)
 1117	
 1118	 if not self.is_daemon_running():
 1119	 print("守护者进程已强制停止")
 1120	 return True
 1121	 else:
 1122	 print("无法停止守护者进程")
 1123	 return False
 1124	
 1125	 except OSError as e:
 1126	 print(f"停止守护者进程失败: {e}")
 1127	 return False
 1128	
 1129	 def get_daemon_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 1130	 """获取守护者进程状态"""
 1131	 pid = self._read_pid_file()
 1132	 is_running = self.is_daemon_running()
 1133	
 1134	 status = {'enabled': self.daemon_config.get('enabled', False), 'running': is_running, 'pid': pid,
 1135	 'pid_file': self.pid_file, 'log_file': self.log_file, 'config': self.daemon_config}
 1136	
 1137	 if is_running and DAEMON_AVAILABLE and psutil and pid:
 1138	 try:
 1139	 process = psutil.Process(pid)
 1140	 status.update(
 1141	 {'start_time': datetime.fromtimestamp(process.create_time()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
 1142	 'memory_usage': f"{process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB",
 1143	 'cpu_percent': f"{process.cpu_percent():.1f}%"})
 1144	 except Exception as e:
 1145	 status['process_info_error'] = str(e)
 1146	
 1147	 return status
 1148	
 1149	 def restart_daemon(self):
 1150	 """重启守护者进程"""
 1151	 print("重启守护者进程...")
 1152	 if self.is_daemon_running():
 1153	 self.stop_daemon()
 1154	 time.sleep(2) # 等待进程完全停止
 1155	 self.start_daemon()

 1165	 def setup_logging(self, config_manager: ConfigManager):
